; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities: Shader
; Extensions: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %ubo %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %tangent "tangent"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %_struct_UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %_struct_UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"
OpName %outColor "outColor"

; GLSL.std.450
%glsl_std_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_mat4v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; UBO structure
%_struct_UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform__struct_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %_struct_UBO

; Global variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform__struct_UBO Uniform

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %_struct_UBO Block
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Constants
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_0_9 = OpConstant %float 0.9
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_3_14159 = OpConstant %float 3.14159
%float_16_0 = OpConstant %float 16.0
%v3float_0_9_0_1_0_1 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_9 %float_0_1 %float_0_1 ; Red
%v3float_0_1_0_1_0_9 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_1 %float_0_1 %float_0_9 ; Blue
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%main_label = OpLabel

; Get uv.y
%uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_val 1

; Calculate sin(uv.y * 3.14159 * 16.0)
%factor1 = OpFMul %float %uv_y %float_3_14159
%factor2 = OpFMul %float %factor1 %float_16_0
%sin_val = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Sin %factor2

; Determine base color (red or blue)
%is_red = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %sin_val %float_0_0
%base_color_v3 = OpSelect %v3float %is_red %v3float_0_9_0_1_0_1 %v3float_0_1_0_1_0_9

; Lambertian shading
%normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%lightPos_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos_val %lightPos_val 0 1 2

%worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos

%light_dir_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_v3 %worldPos_val
%light_dir_norm = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %light_dir_unnorm
%normal_norm = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %normal_val

%diffuse_factor = OpDot %float %normal_norm %light_dir_norm
%clamped_diffuse = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 FMax %diffuse_factor %float_0_0

%term1 = OpFMul %float %clamped_diffuse %float_0_6
%lambertian_factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_4 %term1

%final_color_v3 = OpFMul %v3float %base_color_v3 %lambertian_factor

; Output color with alpha 1.0
%final_color_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_color_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %outColor %final_color_v4

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google-Shaderc; 0
; Bound: 1000
; Schema: 0
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %color %outColor %lightPos_ubo %cameraPos_ubo %model_ubo %view_ubo %projection_ubo %params_ubo
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information (Optional, but good for clarity)
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"

OpName %cameraPos_ubo "cameraPos_ubo"
OpName %model_ubo "model_ubo"
OpName %view_ubo "view_ubo"
OpName %projection_ubo "projection_ubo"
OpName %params_ubo "params_ubo"

; Annotations (Decorations)
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %color Location 4 ; Tangent (Location 3) is available but not used
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

; Type Declarations
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float ; model, view, projection, lightPos, cameraPos, params
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_6_0 = OpConstant %float 6.0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_5_0 = OpConstant %float 5.0
%float_3_0 = OpConstant %float 3.0

%c_yellow = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_0_8 %float_0_0
%c_dark_blue = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_1 %float_0_1 %float_0_3
%c_alpha_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0

; Global Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v2float Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input ; Per-vertex color, not used in this specific task
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output
%ubo_var = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Pointers to UBO members
%model_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_mat4 %ubo_var %int_0
%view_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_mat4 %ubo_var %int_1
%projection_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_mat4 %ubo_var %int_2
%lightPos_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo_var %int_3
%cameraPos_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo_var %int_4
%params_ubo = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo_var %int_5


; Main Function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
%uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv

; Polka dot pattern calculation
%uv_scaled = OpFmul %v2float %uv_val %float_6_0 ; Scale UV to 0-6 range
%uv_fract = OpFract %v2float %uv_scaled        ; Get fractional part (0-1 within each cell)
%uv_minus_center = OpFSub %v2float %uv_fract %float_0_5 ; Offset to center at 0.0,0.0 for radius check

%dist_sq = OpDot %float %uv_minus_center %uv_minus_center ; Squared distance from cell center
%dot_radius_sq = OpFmul %float %float_0_3 %float_0_3 ; 0.3 * 0.3 = 0.09

%is_in_dot = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %dist_sq %dot_radius_sq ; Check if inside dot radius

%base_color_vec3 = OpSelect %v3float %is_in_dot %c_yellow %c_dark_blue

; Lambertian shading
%worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%normal_norm = OpNormalize %v3float %normal_val

%lightPos_vec4 = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ubo
%lightPos_vec3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos_vec4 %lightPos_vec4 0 1 2 ; Extract xyz

%light_dir = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_vec3 %worldPos_val
%light_dir_norm = OpNormalize %v3float %light_dir

%diffuse = OpDot %float %normal_norm %light_dir_norm
%diffuse_clamped = OpFNegate %float %diffuse ; This is for light coming from inside the surface, usually OpMax %float %diffuse %float_0_0 is used. I'll assume standard dot product for now, clamped at 0.
%diffuse_clamped = OpExtInst %float %1 Max %diffuse %float_0_0 ; GLSL.std.450 Max

%shading_factor_term1 = OpFmul %float %float_0_7 %diffuse_clamped
%shading_factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_3 %shading_factor_term1

%final_color_rgb = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %base_color_vec3 %shading_factor

%final_color_vec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_color_rgb %c_alpha_1
OpStore %outColor %final_color_vec4

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Needed for OpExtInst
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %tangent "tangent"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo_instance "" ; Uniform block instance name

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo_instance DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_instance Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4float %m4float %m4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%void_function = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_15 = OpConstant %float 0.15
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1 ; For indexing Ny

%v3float_0_4_0_6_1_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_4 %float_0_6 %float_1_0 ; skyColor (0.4, 0.6, 1.0)
%v3float_0_3_0_15_0_05 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_15 %float_0_05 ; groundColor (0.3, 0.15, 0.05)

; Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%ubo_instance = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_function
%main_label = OpLabel

; Load normal and normalize it
%loaded_normal_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%normalized_normal_v3 = OpNormalize %v3float %loaded_normal_v3

; Extract N.y
%Ny = OpCompositeExtract %float %normalized_normal_v3 %uint_1

; Calculate blend factor: N.y * 0.5 + 0.5
%Ny_times_0_5 = OpFMul %float %Ny %float_0_5
%blend_factor = OpFAdd %float %Ny_times_0_5 %float_0_5

; (1.0 - blend_factor) for groundColor
%one_minus_blend_factor = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %blend_factor

; groundColor * (1.0 - blend_factor)
%ground_color_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3float_0_3_0_15_0_05 %one_minus_blend_factor

; skyColor * blend_factor
%sky_color_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %v3float_0_4_0_6_1_0 %blend_factor

; Add ground and sky terms for ambient color
%ambient_color = OpFAdd %v3float %ground_color_term %sky_color_term

; Load per-vertex color for diffuse term
%loaded_color_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %color

; Calculate diffuse term: 0.3 * color
%diffuse_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %loaded_color_v3 %float_0_3

; Final color = ambient_color + diffuse_term
%final_rgb_color = OpFAdd %v3float %ambient_color %diffuse_term

; Combine with alpha 1.0 for output
%final_output_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb_color %float_1_0

; Store output color
OpStore %outColor %final_output_color
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities: Shader
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
OpSource GLSL 450

; GLSL.std.450 instruction set
%glsl_std_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpDecorate %_DescriptorSet0_Binding0 DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_DescriptorSet0_Binding0 Binding 0

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO Block

; All types and constants
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

; Input variables (only worldPos is used in this task)
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input

; Output variables
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output

; UBO structure (not used in this specific task, but declared as required)
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4float %mat4float %mat4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_DescriptorSet0_Binding0 = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
%load_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%worldPosY = OpCompositeExtract %float %load_worldPos 1
%mult = OpFmul %float %worldPosY %float_0_5
%add = OpFadd %float %mult %float_0_5
%t = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 FClamp %add %float_0_0 %float_1_0

; Colors
%bottom_color_v3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_1 %float_0_4 %float_0_1
%top_color_v3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0

; Mix
%one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %t
%bottom_mixed = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %bottom_color_v3 %one_minus_t
%top_mixed = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %top_color_v3 %t
%final_rgb = OpFAdd %v3float %bottom_mixed %top_mixed

; Output color (RGBA, alpha 1.0)
%final_color_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1_0
OpStore %outColor %final_color_v4
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10
; Capabilities: Shader
OpExtension "SPV_KHR_shader_ballot"
OpExtension "SPV_KHR_variable_pointers"
OpExtension "SPV_KHR_storage_buffer_storage_class"

%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %color %outColor %UBO_var
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; OpDecorate instructions for Location, DescriptorSet, Binding, Block, Offsets
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpDecorate %_struct_10 Block
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_10 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_10 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_10 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_10 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_10 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %_struct_10 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO_var Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%f32 = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2f32 = OpTypeVector %f32 2
%v3f32 = OpTypeVector %f32 3
%v4f32 = OpTypeVector %f32 4
%m4v4f32 = OpTypeMatrix %v4f32 4

%ptr_function_void = OpTypePointer Function %void
%ptr_function_f32 = OpTypePointer Function %f32
%ptr_function_v2f32 = OpTypePointer Function %v2f32
%ptr_function_v3f32 = OpTypePointer Function %v3f32
%ptr_function_v4f32 = OpTypePointer Function %v4f32

%ptr_input_v3f32 = OpTypePointer Input %v3f32
%ptr_input_v2f32 = OpTypePointer Input %v2f32
%ptr_input_v4f32 = OpTypePointer Input %v4f32

%ptr_output_v4f32 = OpTypePointer Output %v4f32

%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%_struct_10 = OpTypeStruct %m4v4f32 %m4v4f32 %m4v4f32 %v4f32 %v4f32 %v4f32
%ptr_uniform__struct_10 = OpTypePointer Uniform %_struct_10

%ptr_uniform_v4f32 = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4f32
%_arr_v4f32_uint_4 = OpTypeArray %v4f32 %uint_4


; Constants
%f32_0 = OpConstant %f32 0.0
%f32_1 = OpConstant %f32 1.0
%f32_0_3 = OpConstant %f32 0.3
%f32_0_7 = OpConstant %f32 0.7
%f32_0_8 = OpConstant %f32 0.8
%f32_0_2 = OpConstant %f32 0.2
%f32_1_5 = OpConstant %f32 1.5
%f32_3_0 = OpConstant %f32 3.0
%f32_5_0 = OpConstant %f32 5.0

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

%v4f32_0_8_0_2_0_2_1_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4f32 %f32_0_8 %f32_0_2 %f32_0_2 %f32_1
%v4f32_0_7_0_7_0_8_1_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4f32 %f32_0_7 %f32_0_7 %f32_0_8 %f32_1


; Global Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3f32 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3f32 Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3f32 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v4f32 Output
%UBO_var = OpVariable %ptr_uniform__struct_10 Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %ptr_function_void
%entry = OpLabel
%load_worldPos = OpLoad %v3f32 %worldPos
%load_normal = OpLoad %v3f32 %normal
%load_color = OpLoad %v3f32 %color ; unused, but loaded as per problem description.

; Access UBO members
%ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4f32 %UBO_var %uint_3
%load_lightPos = OpLoad %v4f32 %ptr_lightPos
%ptr_cameraPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4f32 %UBO_var %uint_4
%load_cameraPos = OpLoad %v4f32 %ptr_cameraPos

; light direction = lightPos.xyz - worldPos
%light_pos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3f32 %load_lightPos %load_lightPos %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
%light_dir = OpFSub %v3f32 %light_pos_xyz %load_worldPos

; Normalize normal and light_dir
%norm_normal = OpExtInst %v3f32 %1 Normalize %load_normal
%norm_light_dir = OpExtInst %v3f32 %1 Normalize %light_dir

; Diffuse factor = dot(normalize(normal), normalize(light_dir))
%diffuse = OpExtInst %f32 %1 Dot %norm_normal %norm_light_dir
%clamped_diffuse = OpExtInst %f32 %1 Fmax %diffuse %f32_0

; Lambertian factor = 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse
%term2_lambert = OpFMul %f32 %f32_0_7 %clamped_diffuse
%lambertian_factor = OpFAdd %f32 %f32_0_3 %term2_lambert

; Base color = (0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1.0)
; Apply Lambertian factor to base color (component-wise multiplication for RGB, keep alpha 1.0)
%base_color_rgb_lambert = OpVectorShuffle %v3f32 %v4f32_0_8_0_2_0_2_1_0 %v4f32_0_8_0_2_0_2_1_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
%lambert_v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3f32 %lambertian_factor %lambertian_factor %lambertian_factor
%final_base_color_rgb = OpFMul %v3f32 %base_color_rgb_lambert %lambert_v3
%final_base_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f32 %final_base_color_rgb %f32_1

; Distance = length(worldPos - cameraPos.xyz)
%camera_pos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3f32 %load_cameraPos %load_cameraPos %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
%world_camera_diff = OpFSub %v3f32 %load_worldPos %camera_pos_xyz
%dist = OpExtInst %f32 %1 Length %world_camera_diff

; Fog factor = clamp((dist - 1.5) / 3.0, 0.0, 1.0)
%dist_minus_1_5 = OpFSub %f32 %dist %f32_1_5
%fog_factor_unclamped = OpFDiv %f32 %dist_minus_1_5 %f32_3_0
%fog_factor = OpExtInst %f32 %1 FClamp %fog_factor_unclamped %f32_0 %f32_1

; Fog color = (0.7, 0.7, 0.8, 1.0) (%v4f32_0_7_0_7_0_8_1_0)

; Mixed color = mix(base_color_with_lambert, fog_color, fog_factor)
%mixed_color = OpExtInst %v4f32 %1 Mix %final_base_color %v4f32_0_7_0_7_0_8_1_0 %fog_factor

OpStore %outColor %mixed_color
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (4387 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc; 1
; Capabilities: Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos_in %normal_in %uv_in %tangent_in %color_in %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; All types and constants will be defined here
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

; Scalar constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

; Vector types
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

; Matrix types (column-major)
%mat4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; Pointers
%ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_mat4v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4v4float
%ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; UBO structure
%type_UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_type_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_UBO

; Function type for main
%fn_void_void = OpTypeFunction %void

; Global variables - Inputs (from vertex shader)
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input

; Global variables - Output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output

; Global variables - Uniform Buffer Object
%UBO_uniform = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_type_UBO Uniform

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %uv_in Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent_in Location 3
OpDecorate %color_in Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %type_UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %type_UBO Block
OpDecorate %UBO_uniform DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO_uniform Binding 0

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_void_void
%entry = OpLabel
  ; Load inputs
  %normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal_in
  %worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos_in

  ; UBO members access
  %lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %UBO_uniform %uint_3
  %lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
  %lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos_val %lightPos_val %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2

  %cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %UBO_uniform %uint_4
  %cameraPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPos_ptr
  %cameraPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %cameraPos_val %cameraPos_val %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2

  ; Normalize normal
  %N = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %normal_val

  ; Calculate Light vector (L)
  %lightDir_vec = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %worldPos_val
  %L = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %lightDir_vec

  ; Calculate t = dot(N, L) * 0.5 + 0.5
  %dotNL = OpExtInst %float %1 Dot %N %L
  %t_scaled = OpFMul %float %dotNL %float_0_5
  %t_val = OpFAdd %float %t_scaled %float_0_5

  ; Define Gooch colors
  %cool_color_vec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_0_2 %float_0_2 %float_0_75
  %warm_color_vec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_4

  ; Mix colors
  %mixed_color_vec3 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 FMix %cool_color_vec3 %warm_color_vec3 %t_val

  ; Output alpha is 1.0
  %final_color_vec4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mixed_color_vec3 %float_1

  OpStore %outColor %final_color_vec4
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- SPIR-V Decorations ---
; Inputs from Vertex Shader
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4

; Output to Fragment Buffer
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Uniform Buffer Object (UBO)
OpDecorate %_ `_`UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %_ `_`UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %_ `_`UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %_ `_`UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %_ `_`UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %_ `_`UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %_ `_`UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO_instance DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO_instance Binding 0


; --- SPIR-V Types ---
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4 ; column-major

%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%_ptr_Input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%_ptr_Input_vec4 = OpTypePointer Input %vec4
%_ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %_ `_`UBO

; UBO structure
%_ `_`UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4

; --- SPIR-V Global Variables ---
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec2 Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec4 Input

%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_vec4 Output

%UBO_instance = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; --- SPIR-V Constants ---
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0
%float_4 = OpConstant %float 4.0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_20 = OpConstant %int 20
%float_m2 = OpConstant %float -2.0
%float_m1 = OpConstant %float -1.0

; --- SPIR-V Entry Point ---
%main = OpEntryPoint Fragment %main_fn "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main_fn OriginUpperLeft

; --- SPIR-V Main Function ---
%main_fn = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
  ; Get UV coordinates
  %in_uv = OpLoad %vec2 %uv

  ; Mandelbrot mapping: c = (uv.x*3-2, uv.y*2-1)
  %uv_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %in_uv 0
  %uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %in_uv 1

  %c_x_mul = OpFMul %float %uv_x %float_3
  %c_x = OpFAdd %float %c_x_mul %float_m2
  
  %c_y_mul = OpFMul %float %uv_y %float_2
  %c_y = OpFAdd %float %c_y_mul %float_m1

  %c = OpCompositeConstruct %vec2 %c_x %c_y

  ; Initialize z = (0, 0)
  %z_x = OpCopyObject %float %float_0
  %z_y = OpCopyObject %float %float_0
  %z = OpCompositeConstruct %vec2 %z_x %z_y

  %iterations = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_int Function
  OpStore %iterations %int_0

  ; Loop for Mandelbrot iterations
  %loop_header = OpLabel
  %current_iterations = OpLoad %int %iterations
  %continue_loop = OpSLessThan %bool %current_iterations %int_20
  OpLoopMerge %loop_end %loop_header_continue None
  OpBranchConditional %continue_loop %loop_body %loop_end

  %loop_body = OpLabel
    ; z_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %z 0 ; z.x
    ; z_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %z 1 ; z.y
    %z_x_current = OpCompositeExtract %float %z 0
    %z_y_current = OpCompositeExtract %float %z 1

    ; z.x_new = z.x*z.x - z.y*z.y + c.x
    %z_x_sq = OpFMul %float %z_x_current %z_x_current
    %z_y_sq = OpFMul %float %z_y_current %z_y_current
    %z_x_sq_minus_z_y_sq = OpFSub %float %z_x_sq %z_y_sq
    %new_z_x = OpFAdd %float %z_x_sq_minus_z_y_sq %c_x

    ; z.y_new = 2*z.x*z.y + c.y
    %two_z_x_z_y = OpFMul %float %float_2 %z_x_current
    %two_z_x_z_y_ = OpFMul %float %two_z_x_z_y %z_y_current
    %new_z_y = OpFAdd %float %two_z_x_z_y_ %c_y

    %z = OpCompositeConstruct %vec2 %new_z_x %new_z_y

    ; |z|^2 = z.x*z.x + z.y*z.y
    %abs_z_sq_x = OpFMul %float %new_z_x %new_z_x
    %abs_z_sq_y = OpFMul %float %new_z_y %new_z_y
    %abs_z_sq = OpFAdd %float %abs_z_sq_x %abs_z_sq_y

    ; Escape condition: |z|^2 > 4
    %escaped = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %abs_z_sq %float_4
    OpBranchConditional %escaped %loop_end %loop_header_continue

  %loop_header_continue = OpLabel
    ; Increment iterations
    %next_iterations = OpIAdd %int %current_iterations %int_1
    OpStore %iterations %next_iterations
    OpBranch %loop_header

  %loop_end = OpLabel
  %final_iterations = OpLoad %int %iterations
  
  ; Calculate color based on iterations: t = iterations/20
  %float_final_iterations = OpConvertSToF %float %final_iterations
  %t = OpFDiv %float %float_final_iterations %float_20

  ; Color: (t, t*0.5, 1.0-t), alpha 1.0
  %t_half = OpFMul %float %t %float_0_5
  %one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %float_1 %t

  %final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %t %t_half %one_minus_t %float_1
  OpStore %outColor %final_color

  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor %_ %_GLF_UBO_UBO
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %tangent "tangent"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %_GLF_UBO_UBO "_GLF_UBO_UBO"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %_GLF_UBO_UBO DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_GLF_UBO_UBO Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4
%_ptr_Input_vec3 = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%_ptr_Input_vec2 = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%_ptr_Input_vec4 = OpTypePointer Input %vec4
%_ptr_Output_vec4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%bool = OpTypeBool

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%_ptr_Uniform_vec4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%_ptr_Function_vec3 = OpTypePointer Function %vec3
%_ptr_Function_vec2 = OpTypePointer Function %vec2

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%float_8 = OpConstant %float 8
%float_16 = OpConstant %float 16
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_0_7_0_7_0_7_1 = OpConstantComposite %vec4 %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_1 ; Mortar color
%float_0_7_0_2_0_1_1 = OpConstantComposite %vec4 %float_0_7 %float_0_2 %float_0_1 %float_1 ; Brick color

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5

; Global variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec2 Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_vec3 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_vec4 Output
%_GLF_UBO_UBO = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Functions
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
%_ = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_float Function
%_1 = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_vec3 Function
%_2 = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_vec2 Function

; Get light position from UBO
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_vec4 %_GLF_UBO_UBO %int_3
%lightPos = OpLoad %vec4 %lightPos_ptr

; Get camera position from UBO
%cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_vec4 %_GLF_UBO_UBO %int_4
%cameraPos = OpLoad %vec4 %cameraPos_ptr

; Get params from UBO (for example params.y for a time value)
%params_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_vec4 %_GLF_UBO_UBO %int_5
%params = OpLoad %vec4 %params_ptr


; === Brick pattern logic ===
%_uv = OpLoad %vec2 %uv
%scaled_uv_x = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec2 %_uv %float_8
%scaled_uv_y = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec2 %_uv %float_16

%floor_uv_y = OpFloor %float %scaled_uv_y
%mod_uv_y_2 = OpFMod %float %scaled_uv_y %float_2
%is_odd_row = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %mod_uv_y_2 %float_1

%half_brick_offset = OpSelect %float %is_odd_row %float_0_5 %float_0
%staggered_uv_x = OpFAdd %float %scaled_uv_x %half_brick_offset

%brick_x = OpFMod %float %staggered_uv_x %float_1
%brick_y = OpFMod %float %scaled_uv_y %float_1

%mortar_x = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %brick_x %float_0_05
%mortar_y = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %brick_y %float_0_1
%is_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %mortar_x %mortar_y

%brick_color_vec3 = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %float_0_7_0_2_0_1_1 %float_0_7_0_2_0_1_1 0 1 2
%mortar_color_vec3 = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %float_0_7_0_7_0_7_1 %float_0_7_0_7_0_7_1 0 1 2

%base_color = OpSelect %vec3 %is_mortar %mortar_color_vec3 %brick_color_vec3

; === Lambertian shading ===
%_normal = OpLoad %vec3 %normal
%normalized_normal = OpNormalize %vec3 %_normal

%light_dir_vec3 = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %lightPos %lightPos 0 1 2
%worldPos_vec3 = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos
%dir_to_light = OpFSub %vec3 %light_dir_vec3 %worldPos_vec3
%normalized_dir_to_light = OpNormalize %vec3 %dir_to_light

%diffuse = OpDot %float %normalized_normal %normalized_dir_to_light
%clamped_diffuse = OpFNegate %float %diffuse
%clamped_diffuse_positive = OpFMax %float %clamped_diffuse %float_0

%term1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %float %float_0_6 %clamped_diffuse_positive
%lambertian_factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_4 %term1

%final_color_rgb = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %base_color %lambertian_factor
%final_color_rgba = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %final_color_rgb %float_1

OpStore %outColor %final_color_rgba
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; Version: 1.0

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %outColor %_
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

OpName %normal "normal"

OpName %UBO "UBO"

OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"

OpName %_param_params "params"

; Decorations

OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

OpDecorate %_ Binding 0
OpDecorate %_param_cameraPos Offset 208
OpDecorate %_param_params Offset 224

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_struct_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %struct_UBO
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%v4float_1_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_1 %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
%v4float_0_0_0_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0 %float_1
%int_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%int_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %uint 5

; Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%_ = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_struct_UBO Uniform
%_param_cameraPos = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ %int_4
%_param_params = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %_ %int_5

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%entry = OpLabel
%_normal_load = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%_normal_norm = OpNormalize %v3float %_normal_load
%_worldPos_load = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%_cameraPos_load = OpLoad %v4float %_param_cameraPos
%_cameraPos_xyz = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %_cameraPos_load %int_0 ; x
%_cameraPos_y = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %_cameraPos_load %int_1 ; y
%_cameraPos_z = OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %_cameraPos_load %int_2 ; z
%_cameraPos_vec3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %_cameraPos_xyz %_cameraPos_y %_cameraPos_z
%_view_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %_cameraPos_vec3 %_worldPos_load
%_view_norm = OpNormalize %v3float %_view_unnorm
%_dot_NV = OpDot %float %_normal_norm %_view_norm
%_NdotV = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Max %_dot_NV %float_0

%_lt_0_5 = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %_NdotV %float_0_5

%_if_true_r = OpCopyObject %float %float_1
%_if_true_g_mul = OpFMul %float %float_2 %_NdotV
%_if_true_g = OpCopyObject %float %_if_true_g_mul
%_if_true_b = OpCopyObject %float %float_0
%_if_true_a = OpCopyObject %float %float_1
%_if_true_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %_if_true_r %_if_true_g %_if_true_b %_if_true_a

%_diff_0_5 = OpFSub %float %_NdotV %float_0_5
%_diff_0_5_mul_2 = OpFMul %float %_diff_0_5 %float_2
%_if_false_r_g = OpFSub %float %float_1 %_diff_0_5_mul_2
%_if_false_b = OpCopyObject %float %_diff_0_5_mul_2
%_if_false_a = OpCopyObject %float %float_1
%_if_false_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %_if_false_r_g %_if_false_r_g %_if_false_b %_if_false_a

%_final_color = OpSelect %v4float %_lt_0_5 %_if_true_color %_if_false_color

OpStore %outColor %_final_color
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL HPP
; Capabilities: Shader
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %tangent %color %outColor %_ %_param_var_UBO
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; GLSL.std.450 extended instruction set
%glsl_std_450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; All debug names
OpName %main "main"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %tangent "tangent"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %_param_var_UBO "UBO" ; Renamed to avoid clash
OpName %_ "UBO" ; Placeholder for the Block type

; All decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
OpDecorate %color Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpDecorate %_ DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %_ Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; All types, specifically those with storage class
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; UBO structure type
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4v4float %m4v4float %m4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float

; Pointers for storage classes
%ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; All constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_32 = OpConstant %float 32

%v3float_ambient = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_1 %float_0_05 %float_0_05 ; (0.1, 0.05, 0.05)
%v3float_specular = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1 ; (1,1,1)
%v3float_zero = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0

%v4float_alpha_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

; Global variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v2float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output
%_param_var_UBO = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void
%entry = OpLabel
; Load inputs
%_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%_color = OpLoad %v3float %color

; Load UBO members
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %_param_var_UBO %uint_3
%_lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %_param_var_UBO %uint_4
%_cameraPos = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPos_ptr

; Convert lightPos and cameraPos to vec3
%_lightPos_vec3 = OpVectorExtractDynamic %v3float %_lightPos %uint_0
%_cameraPos_vec3 = OpVectorExtractDynamic %v3float %_cameraPos %uint_0

; Normalize normal vector
%norm_normal = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %_normal

; Calculate Light direction (L)
%light_dir_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %_lightPos_vec3 %_worldPos
%light_dir = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %light_dir_unnorm

; Calculate View direction (V)
%view_dir_unnorm = OpFSub %v3float %_cameraPos_vec3 %_worldPos
%view_dir = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %view_dir_unnorm

; Ambient component
%ambient_comp = OpCopyObject %v3float %v3float_ambient

; Diffuse component: vertex color * max(dot(N,L),0)
%N_dot_L = OpDot %float %norm_normal %light_dir
%max_N_dot_L = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Max %N_dot_L %float_0
%diffuse_comp = OpFMul %v3float %_color %max_N_dot_L

; Specular component: (1,1,1) * shininess 32 * R=reflect(-L,N)
%neg_light_dir = OpFNegate %v3float %light_dir
%reflect_vec = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Reflect %neg_light_dir %norm_normal
%R_dot_V = OpDot %float %reflect_vec %view_dir
%max_R_dot_V = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Max %R_dot_V %float_0
%pow_spec = OpExtInst %float %glsl_std_450 Pow %max_R_dot_V %float_32
%specular_comp = OpFMul %v3float %v3float_specular %pow_spec

; Sum components
%sum_rgb_1 = OpFAdd %v3float %ambient_comp %diffuse_comp
%final_rgb = OpFAdd %v3float %sum_rgb_1 %specular_comp

; Clamp to [0,1]
%clamped_rgb_min = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Max %final_rgb %v3float_zero
%clamped_rgb = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Min %clamped_rgb_min %v3float_specular ; Using v3float_specular as (1,1,1)

; Output final color (RGBA float, alpha 1.0)
%final_outColor = OpVectorShuffle %v4float %clamped_rgb %v4float_alpha_1 0 1 2 7
OpStore %outColor %final_outColor

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd
Rendered: missing
Reference
Test 42: Geometry Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly geometry shader. It will be assembled with
spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0) and rendered using a fixed vertex shader and fragment shader.

**Geometry shader requirements:**
- `OpCapability Geometry`
- `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- `OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main"` listing ALL interface variables
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (InputPoints/InputLines/Triangles/InputLinesAdjacency/InputTrianglesAdjacency)
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (OutputPoints/OutputLineStrip/OutputTriangleStrip)
- `OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices ` (max vertices emitted)
- `OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1`

**Input from vertex shader (per-vertex arrays):**
The input gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block (must be decorated with Block + BuiltIn Position).
```
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
; Array size depends on input primitive:
; InputPoints: 1, InputLines: 2, Triangles: 3
; InputLinesAdjacency: 4, InputTrianglesAdjacency: 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
; Access: OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_i %int_0 -> gl_in[i].gl_Position
```

User-defined inputs are also arrays of the same size:
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[]; ; positions in clip space
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[]; ; vertex normals
layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[]; ; per-vertex colors
```

**Output (per emitted vertex):**
The output gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block:
```
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Store: OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0 -> gl_out.gl_Position
```
```
layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor; ; color for fragment shader
```

**Emit vertices with:** `OpEmitVertex` after storing gl_Position and outColor.
**End primitive with:** `OpEndPrimitive` after emitting a complete strip.

**Available UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from geometry shader:**
Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params).

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the geometry shader.**


**Input primitive:** InputPoints (1 vertex per invocation, array size 1)
**Geometry:** 25 colored points in a 5x5 grid spread across [-0.8, 0.8].

**Task:** Expand each point into a small colored quad (4 vertices as triangle strip).
1. Read gl_in[0].gl_Position (the point position).
2. Read color[0] (the point's color).
3. Define a half-size: h = 0.04.
4. Emit 4 vertices forming a quad centered on the point:
- (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
- All with z=0, w=1, and the same color.
5. Output as triangle strip, max 4 vertices.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly. Geometry shaders receive primitives (points, lines, or triangles) and can output completely new geometry — for example, turning a single point into a billboard quad or a thin line into a thick ribbon.

Each subpass specifies a different input primitive type and a transformation task. The rendered output is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference image. Writing geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly requires precise control of vertex emission and primitive topology.

 0.0000
[Points to Quads] SPIR-V validation failed: error: line 33: MemberDecorate is in an invalid layout section
OpMemberDecorate %24 0 BuiltIn Position

Geometry Shader - Points to Quads (points)

View SPIR-V (3687 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10
; Capabilities:
OpCapability Shader
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_Position_in %color_in %gl_Position_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_Position_in "gl_Position"
OpName %color_in "color"
OpName %gl_Position_out "gl_Position"
OpName %outColor "outColor"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1

%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_04 = OpConstant %float 0.04

%ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
%ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_Position_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input

; color_in (location 2, vec3 array)
%arr_v3float_1 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%ptr_Input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_1
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_Position_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; outColor (location 0, vec3)
%ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
; Get input gl_Position (gl_in[0].gl_Position)
%ptr_gl_pos_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v4float %gl_Position_in %int_0 %int_0
%input_pos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_gl_pos_in

; Get input color (color[0])
%ptr_color_in = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_0
%input_color = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_in

; Extract x, y from input_pos
%x = OpCompositeExtract %float %input_pos 0
%y = OpCompositeExtract %float %input_pos 1

; Calculate vertex offsets
%x_minus_h = OpFSub %float %x %float_0_04
%x_plus_h = OpFAdd %float %x %float_0_04
%y_minus_h = OpFSub %float %y %float_0_04
%y_plus_h = OpFAdd %float %y %float_0_04

; Vertices for the quad (triangle strip)
; (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
; Vertex 1: (x-h, y-h, 0, 1)
%v1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_minus_h %y_minus_h %float_0_0 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v1_pos
OpStore %outColor %input_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: (x+h, y-h, 0, 1)
%v2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_plus_h %y_minus_h %float_0_0 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v2_pos
OpStore %outColor %input_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: (x-h, y+h, 0, 1)
%v3_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_minus_h %y_plus_h %float_0_0 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v3_pos
OpStore %outColor %input_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4: (x+h, y+h, 0, 1)
%v4_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_plus_h %y_plus_h %float_0_0 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v4_pos
OpStore %outColor %input_color
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Points to Diamonds (points)

View SPIR-V (4289 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Capabilities: Shader, Geometry
; Extension: SPV_KHR_shader_ballot

OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %worldPos_in %color_in %outColor_out
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex_in"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_in 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_out "gl_PerVertex_out"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_out 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos_in"
OpName %color_in "color_in"
OpName %outColor_out "outColor_out"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor_out Location 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_1 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
%_ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_1 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_1

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out

%arr_v3float_1 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_1 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_1

%fn = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0

; Global Variables
%gl_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_1 Input
%gl_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_1 Input
%color_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_1 Input
%outColor_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v3float Output

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn
%main_label = OpLabel

  ; Get input gl_Position (vec4) for gl_in[0].gl_Position
  %ge_gl_in_0_0 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
  %input_pos = OpLoad %v4float %ge_gl_in_0_0

  ; Get input color (vec3) for color_in[0]
  %ge_color_in_0 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_0
  %input_color = OpLoad %v3float %ge_color_in_0

  ; Extract x, y, z, w from input_pos
  %input_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %input_pos 0
  %input_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %input_pos 1
  %input_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %input_pos 2
  %input_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %input_pos 3

  ; Calculate diamond vertices:
  ; Top: (x, y+h)
  %y_plus_h = OpFAdd %float %input_y %float_0_05
  %top_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %input_x %y_plus_h %input_z %input_w

  ; Right: (x+h, y)
  %x_plus_h = OpFAdd %float %input_x %float_0_05
  %right_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_plus_h %input_y %input_z %input_w

  ; Left: (x-h, y)
  %x_minus_h = OpFSub %float %input_x %float_0_05
  %left_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_minus_h %input_y %input_z %input_w

  ; Bottom: (x, y-h)
  %y_minus_h = OpFSub %float %input_y %float_0_05
  %bottom_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %input_x %y_minus_h %input_z %input_w

  ; Emit vertices: top, right, left, bottom
  ; Top
  %ptr_out_pos = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
  OpStore %ptr_out_pos %top_pos_v4
  OpStore %outColor_out %input_color
  OpEmitVertex

  ; Right
  OpStore %ptr_out_pos %right_pos_v4
  OpStore %outColor_out %input_color
  OpEmitVertex

  ; Left
  OpStore %ptr_out_pos %left_pos_v4
  OpStore %outColor_out %input_color
  OpEmitVertex

  ; Bottom
  OpStore %ptr_out_pos %bottom_pos_v4
  OpStore %outColor_out %input_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpEndPrimitive
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Points to Hexagons (points)

View SPIR-V (8173 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_Position %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices %uint_18
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations %uint_1

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4float = OpTypeMatrix %float 4 4

%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_18 = OpConstant %uint 18 ; OutputVertices

%ptr_input_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_output_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

; UBO structure (kept for completeness as per problem, but not accessed in this specific shader task)
; struct UBO {
;     mat4 model;
;     mat4 view;
;     mat4 proj;
;     vec4 lightPos;
;     vec4 cameraPos;
;     vec4 params;
; };
%type_ubo = OpTypeStruct %mat4float %mat4float %mat4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %type_ubo Block
%ptr_uniform_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_ubo
%ubo_var = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_ubo Uniform DescriptorSet 0 Binding 0

; gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_PerVertex_in_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type Block

; Input array for gl_PerVertex_in (size 1 for InputPoints)
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_1 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_type %uint_1
%ptr_input_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_1
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_gl_PerVertex_in Input BuiltIn Position

; gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_PerVertex_out_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type Block
%ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out_type
%gl_Position = OpVariable %ptr_output_gl_PerVertex_out Output BuiltIn Position

; User-defined inputs
%arr_v3float_1 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1
%ptr_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_1

%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3 Input
OpDecorate %color Location 2

; User-defined output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3 Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
  ; Read input position and color
  %input_gl_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4 %gl_in %uint_0 %uint_0
  %center_pos_in = OpLoad %v4float %input_gl_pos_ptr

  %input_color_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3 %color %uint_0
  %in_color = OpLoad %v3float %input_color_ptr

  ; Constants for hexagon calculations
  %radius = OpConstant %float 0.04
  %f_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
  %f_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0

  ; Trigonometric constants for 0, 60, 120, 180, 240, 300 degrees
  %cos0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
  %sin0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
  %cos60 = OpConstant %float 0.5
  %sin60 = OpConstant %float 0.866025404
  %cos120 = OpConstant %float -0.5
  %sin120 = OpConstant %float 0.866025404
  %cos180 = OpConstant %float -1.0
  %sin180 = OpConstant %float 0.0
  %cos240 = OpConstant %float -0.5
  %sin240 = OpConstant %float -0.866025404
  %cos300 = OpConstant %float 0.5
  %sin300 = OpConstant %float -0.866025404

  ; Store calculated edge offsets (radius * cos/sin)
  %edge_dx_0 = OpFMul %float %radius %cos0
  %edge_dy_0 = OpFMul %float %radius %sin0
  %edge_dx_60 = OpFMul %float %radius %cos60
  %edge_dy_60 = OpFMul %float %radius %sin60
  %edge_dx_120 = OpFMul %float %radius %cos120
  %edge_dy_120 = OpFMul %float %radius %sin120
  %edge_dx_180 = OpFMul %float %radius %cos180
  %edge_dy_180 = OpFMul %float %radius %sin180
  %edge_dx_240 = OpFMul %float %radius %cos240
  %edge_dy_240 = OpFMul %float %radius %sin240
  %edge_dx_300 = OpFMul %float %radius %cos300
  %edge_dy_300 = OpFMul %float %radius %sin300

  ; Edge color (slightly darker)
  %darken_factor = OpConstant %float 0.8
  %edge_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %in_color %darken_factor

  ; Extract components of center_pos_in for calculations
  %center_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos_in 0
  %center_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos_in 1
  %center_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos_in 2
  %center_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos_in 3

  ; Calculate edge positions
  ; E0
  %edge_pos_x_0 = OpFAdd %float %center_x %edge_dx_0
  %edge_pos_y_0 = OpFAdd %float %center_y %edge_dy_0
  %edge_pos_v4_0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %edge_pos_x_0 %edge_pos_y_0 %center_z %center_w
  ; E60
  %edge_pos_x_60 = OpFAdd %float %center_x %edge_dx_60
  %edge_pos_y_60 = OpFAdd %float %center_y %edge_dy_60
  %edge_pos_v4_60 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %edge_pos_x_60 %edge_pos_y_60 %center_z %center_w
  ; E120
  %edge_pos_x_120 = OpFAdd %float %center_x %edge_dx_120
  %edge_pos_y_120 = OpFAdd %float %center_y %edge_dy_120
  %edge_pos_v4_120 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %edge_pos_x_120 %edge_pos_y_120 %center_z %center_w
  ; E180
  %edge_pos_x_180 = OpFAdd %float %center_x %edge_dx_180
  %edge_pos_y_180 = OpFAdd %float %center_y %edge_dy_180
  %edge_pos_v4_180 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %edge_pos_x_180 %edge_pos_y_180 %center_z %center_w
  ; E240
  %edge_pos_x_240 = OpFAdd %float %center_x %edge_dx_240
  %edge_pos_y_240 = OpFAdd %float %center_y %edge_dy_240
  %edge_pos_v4_240 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %edge_pos_x_240 %edge_pos_y_240 %center_z %center_w
  ; E300
  %edge_pos_x_300 = OpFAdd %float %center_x %edge_dx_300
  %edge_pos_y_300 = OpFAdd %float %center_y %edge_dy_300
  %edge_pos_v4_300 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %edge_pos_x_300 %edge_pos_y_300 %center_z %center_w

  %gl_Position_out_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4 %gl_Position %uint_0

  ; Triangle 1: center, E0, E60
  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %center_pos_in
  OpStore %outColor %in_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_0
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_60
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive

  ; Triangle 2: center, E60, E120
  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %center_pos_in
  OpStore %outColor %in_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_60
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_120
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive

  ; Triangle 3: center, E120, E180
  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %center_pos_in
  OpStore %outColor %in_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_120
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_180
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive

  ; Triangle 4: center, E180, E240
  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %center_pos_in
  OpStore %outColor %in_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_180
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_240
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive

  ; Triangle 5: center, E240, E300
  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %center_pos_in
  OpStore %outColor %in_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_240
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_300
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive

  ; Triangle 6: center, E300, E0 (closing)
  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %center_pos_in
  OpStore %outColor %in_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_300
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex

  OpStore %gl_Position_out_ptr %edge_pos_v4_0
  OpStore %outColor %edge_color
  OpEmitVertex
  OpEndPrimitive

  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Thick Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (5837 chars)
OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %worldPos %normal %color %outColor %UBO_variable
OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug info
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex_in"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_in 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %arr_pv_in "arr_pv_in"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_out "gl_PerVertex_out"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_out 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %UBO_params_block "UBO_params_block"
OpMemberName %UBO_params_block 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO_params_block 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO_params_block 2 "proj"
OpMemberName %UBO_params_block 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO_params_block 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO_params_block 5 "params"
OpName %UBO_variable "UBO_variable"

; Annotations
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %arr_pv_in ArrayStride 16
OpDecorate %gl_in Block
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %color Location 2
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_out Block
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO decorations - as per test 41.
OpDecorate %UBO_params_block Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO_params_block 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO_variable DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO_variable Binding 0

; Types
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
%2 = OpTypeVoid
%3 = OpTypeFunction %2
%4 = OpTypeFloat 32
%5 = OpTypeVector %4 2
%6 = OpTypeVector %4 3
%7 = OpTypeVector %4 4
%8 = OpTypeInt 32 1
%9 = OpTypeInt 32 0
%10 = OpTypeBool
%11 = OpTypeMatrix %7 4

; Constants
%13 = OpConstant %9 2 ; for array size 2 (InputLines)
%18 = OpConstant %9 0
%19 = OpConstant %9 1
%20 = OpConstant %9 2
%21 = OpConstant %9 3
%22 = OpConstant %8 0
%23 = OpConstant %8 1
%24 = OpConstant %4 0.0
%25 = OpConstant %4 1.0
%26 = OpConstant %4 0.03

; UBO Struct and Variable
%12 = OpTypeStruct %7 ; gl_PerVertex_in member 0
%14 = OpTypeArray %12 %13 ; arr_pv_in
%15 = OpTypePointer Input %14 ; ptr_Input_arr_pv_in
%27 = OpTypeStruct %7 ; gl_PerVertex_out member 0
%28 = OpTypePointer Output %27 ; ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out

%16 = OpTypePointer Input %7 ; For gl_Position access chain
%17 = OpTypePointer Input %6 ; For worldPos, normal, color access chain
%29 = OpTypePointer Output %6 ; For outColor

%30 = OpTypeStruct %11 %11 %11 %7 %7 %7 ; UBO_params_block
%31 = OpTypePointer Uniform %30 ; ptr_UBO_params
%32 = OpVariable %31 Uniform ; UBO_variable

; Global Variables
%33 = OpVariable %15 Input ; gl_in
%34 = OpVariable %17 Input ; worldPos
%35 = OpVariable %17 Input ; normal
%36 = OpVariable %17 Input ; color
%37 = OpVariable %28 Output ; gl_out
%38 = OpVariable %29 Output ; outColor

%main = OpFunction %2 None %3
%39 = OpLabel ; entry basic block

; Read gl_in[0].gl_Position and gl_in[1].gl_Position
%40 = OpAccessChain %16 %33 %22 %22 ; p0_ptr = &gl_in[0].gl_Position
%41 = OpLoad %7 %40 ; p0_v4
%42 = OpAccessChain %16 %33 %23 %22 ; p1_ptr = &gl_in[1].gl_Position
%43 = OpLoad %7 %42 ; p1_v4

; Read color[0] and color[1]
%44 = OpAccessChain %17 %36 %22 ; c0_ptr = &color[0]
%45 = OpLoad %6 %44 ; c0_v3
%46 = OpAccessChain %17 %36 %23 ; c1_ptr = &color[1]
%47 = OpLoad %6 %46 ; c1_v3

; Extract vec3 from v4float positions (assuming w=1.0 for clip space positions)
%48 = OpVectorShuffle %6 %41 %41 %18 %19 %20 ; p0_v3
%49 = OpVectorShuffle %6 %43 %43 %18 %19 %20 ; p1_v3

; Compute line direction: dir = p1 - p0
%50 = OpFSub %6 %49 %48 ; dir_v3

; Compute perpendicular: perp = normalize(vec2(-dir.y, dir.x)) * thickness
; Need to extract x and y from dir_v3
%51 = OpCompositeExtract %4 %50 1 ; dir_y
%52 = OpCompositeExtract %4 %50 0 ; dir_x
%53 = OpFNegate %4 %51 ; neg_dir_y
%54 = OpCompositeConstruct %5 %53 %52 ; (-dir.y, dir.x)
%55 = OpDot %4 %54 %54 ; len_perp_2d_sq
%56 = OpExtInst %4 %1 Fsqrt %55 ; len_perp_2d
%57 = OpFDiv %5 %54 %56 ; norm_perp_2d

%58 = OpVectorTimesScalar %5 %57 %26 ; scaled_perp_2d (normalize * thickness)

; Convert scaled_perp_2d to v4float for addition with positions.
; Assuming perp should be applied in XY plane, Z=0, W=0.
%59 = OpCompositeExtract %4 %58 0 ; perp_v4_x
%60 = OpCompositeExtract %4 %58 1 ; perp_v4_y
%61 = OpCompositeConstruct %7 %59 %60 %24 %24 ; perp_v4 (x, y, 0.0, 0.0)

; Emit 4 vertices as triangle strip: p0 + perp, p0 - perp, p1 + perp, p1 - perp.

; Vertex 0: p0 + perp
%62 = OpFAdd %7 %41 %61 ; v0_pos = p0_v4 + perp_v4
OpStore %37 %62
OpStore %38 %45 ; Use c0 for first two
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: p0 - perp
%63 = OpFNegate %7 %61 ; neg_perp_v4
%64 = OpFAdd %7 %41 %63 ; v1_pos = p0_v4 - perp_v4
OpStore %37 %64
OpStore %38 %45 ; Use c0 for first two
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: p1 + perp
%65 = OpFAdd %7 %43 %61 ; v2_pos = p1_v4 + perp_v4
OpStore %37 %65
OpStore %38 %47 ; Use c1 for last two
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: p1 - perp
%66 = OpFAdd %7 %43 %63 ; v3_pos = p1_v4 - perp_v4
OpStore %37 %66
OpStore %38 %47 ; Use c1 for last two
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd
