; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities: Shader, Geometry

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_Position_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_Position_out %outColor_out %UBO_var
OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug Name Strings (optional, but good for readability)
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %gl_Position_in "gl_Position_in"
OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos_in"
OpName %normal_in "normal_in"
OpName %color_in "color_in"
OpName %gl_Position_out "gl_Position_out"
OpName %outColor_out "outColor_out"
OpName %UBO_var "UBO_var"

; GLSL.std.450 extension
%GLSLstd450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; All Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4 ; 4x4 float matrix

%ptr_v4float_Input = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_v3float_Input = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_v4float_Output = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_v3float_Output = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v2float = OpTypePointer Function %v2float
%_ptr_Function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

; Constants
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_04 = OpConstant %float 0.04
%float_0_005 = OpConstant %float 0.005
%float_minus_1_0 = OpConstant %float -1.0
%v4float_0_0_0_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_1_0

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params
; Same layout as test 41
%type_struct_UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_type_struct_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_struct_UBO
%UBO_var = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_type_struct_UBO Uniform
OpDecorate %type_struct_UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %type_struct_UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO_var Binding 0

; Input gl_PerVertex block
%gl_PerVertex_in_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float ; struct { vec4 gl_Position; }
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_type_2 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in_type %uint_2 ; gl_in[2]
%ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_type_2 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_type_2
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in_type_2 Input
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in_type 0 BuiltIn Position

; Output gl_PerVertex block
%gl_PerVertex_out_type = OpTypeStruct %v4float ; struct { vec4 gl_Position; }
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out_type = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out_type
%gl_Position_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out_type Output
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out_type 0 BuiltIn Position

; Input user-defined arrays
%arr_v3float_2 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_Input_arr_v3float_2 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_2
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float_2 Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float_2 Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float_2 Input
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; Output user-defined variable
%outColor_out = OpVariable %ptr_v3float_Output Output
OpDecorate %outColor_out Location 0

%main = OpFunction %void None %void
%label_main = OpLabel
; Get input positions (gl_Position)
%p0_v4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Input %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%p0_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_v4_ptr
%p1_v4_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v4float_Input %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%p1_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_v4_ptr

; Get input colors
%c0_v3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %color_in %int_0
%c0_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_v3_ptr
%c1_v3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_v3float_Input %color_in %int_1
%c1_v3 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_v3_ptr

; Extract 2D (xy) components of positions
%p0_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %p0_v4 %p0_v4 %int_0 %int_1
%p1_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %p1_v4 %p1_v4 %int_0 %int_1

; Calculate 2D direction vector
%dir_xy = OpFSub %v2float %p1_xy %p0_xy

; Calculate 2D perpendicular vector (-y, x)
%dir_xy_y = OpVectorExtractComponent %float %dir_xy %int_1
%dir_xy_x = OpVectorExtractComponent %float %dir_xy %int_0
%perp_xy_x = OpFNegate %float %dir_xy_y
%perp_xy = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %perp_xy_x %dir_xy_x

; Normalize 2D perpendicular vector
%len_sq_perp_xy = OpDot %float %perp_xy %perp_xy
%len_perp_xy = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %len_sq_perp_xy
%inv_len_perp_xy = OpFDiv %float %float_1_0 %len_perp_xy
%normalized_perp_xy = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp_xy %inv_len_perp_xy

; Construct 3D perpendicular vector (assuming z component is 0 for perpendicular offset in clip space)
%normalized_perp_x = OpVectorExtractComponent %float %normalized_perp_xy %int_0
%normalized_perp_y = OpVectorExtractComponent %float %normalized_perp_xy %int_1
%normalized_perp_3D = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %normalized_perp_x %normalized_perp_y %float_0_0

; Calculate offset vectors
%offset_start = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normalized_perp_3D %float_0_04
%offset_end = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normalized_perp_3D %float_0_005

; Extract 3D components of positions
%p0_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p0_v4 %p0_v4 %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
%p1_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p1_v4 %p1_v4 %int_0 %int_1 %int_2

; Get original W components
%p0_w = OpVectorExtractComponent %float %p0_v4 %int_3
%p1_w = OpVectorExtractComponent %float %p1_v4 %int_3

; Emit 4 vertices for triangle strip

; Vertex 0: p0 + offset_start, c0
%v0_pos_xyz = OpFAdd %v3float %p0_xyz %offset_start
%v0_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v0_pos_xyz %p0_w
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v0_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %c0_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: p0 - offset_start, c0
%v1_pos_xyz = OpFSub %v3float %p0_xyz %offset_start
%v1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_pos_xyz %p0_w
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v1_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %c0_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: p1 + offset_end, c1
%v2_pos_xyz = OpFAdd %v3float %p1_xyz %offset_end
%v2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_pos_xyz %p1_w
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v2_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %c1_v3
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: p1 - offset_end, c1
%v3_pos_xyz = OpFSub %v3float %p1_xyz %offset_end
%v3_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_pos_xyz %p1_w
OpStore %gl_Position_out %v3_pos
OpStore %outColor_out %c1_v3
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Arrow Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (8171 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 14
; Capabilities: Geometry
; EntryPoint: Geometry
; Input Primitive: InputLines
; Output Primitive: OutputTriangleStrip
; Max Output Vertices: 7
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %_ %worldPos %normal %color %gl_Position %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 7
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %_ "worldPos" ; Placeholder for UBO. Will replace with actual UBO struct later.
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %gl_Position "gl_Position"
OpName %outColor "outColor"

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_7 = OpConstant %uint 7

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_015 = OpConstant %float 0.015
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_minus_1_0 = OpConstant %float -1.0

; gl_PerVertex input struct
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block

; Array for gl_in, size 2 for InputLines
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in_2 = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_2
%ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in_2
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input

; User-defined inputs (worldPos, normal, color)
%arr_v3float_2 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_Input_v3float_arr = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_2

%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float_arr Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location %uint_0

%normal = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float_arr Input
OpDecorate %normal Location %uint_1

%color = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float_arr Input
OpDecorate %color Location %uint_2

; gl_PerVertex output struct
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block

%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_Position = OpVariable %ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output

; User-defined output (outColor)
%ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location %uint_0

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - placeholder for now, not used in logic
; Will assume standard matrix and vector types if details for "test 41" are not found.
; For now, just declare a dummy struct to satisfy OpEntryPoint.
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float ; model, view, proj, lightPos, cameraPos, params
OpDecorate %ubo_struct Block
%ptr_Uniform_ubo_struct = OpTypePointer Uniform %ubo_struct
%_ = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_ubo_struct Uniform
OpDecorate %_ DescriptorSet %uint_0
OpDecorate %_ Binding %uint_0

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
; Get input positions and colors
%p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos %uint_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v3float %p0_ptr

%p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos %uint_1
%p1 = OpLoad %v3float %p1_ptr

%c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %color %uint_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr

%c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_Input_v3float %color %uint_1
%c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr

; Compute direction dir = p1 - p0
%dir = OpFSub %v3float %p1 %p0

; Compute perpendicular perp = normalize(-dir.y, dir.x) (assuming Z=0 for 2D perp calculation)
%dir_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir %uint_1
%dir_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir %uint_0
%neg_dir_y = OpFNegate %float %dir_y

%perp_unnormalized_2d = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_dir_y %dir_x
%perp_2d = OpNormalize %v2float %perp_unnormalized_2d

; Convert 2D perp to 3D vec3 (x, y, 0)
%perp_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %perp_2d %uint_0
%perp_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %perp_2d %uint_1
%perp_3d = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %perp_x %perp_y %float_0_0

; Shaft: thickness = 0.015.
; mid = p0 + 0.75 * (p1 - p0)
%p1_minus_p0 = OpFSub %v3float %p1 %p0
%scaled_p1_minus_p0 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %p1_minus_p0 %float_0_75
%mid = OpFAdd %v3float %p0 %scaled_p1_minus_p0

; Calculate perp * 0.015
%perp_scaled_shaft = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp_3d %float_0_015

; Shaft vertices with color c0
; p0_perp_minus = p0 - perp*0.015
%p0_perp_minus = OpFSub %v3float %p0 %perp_scaled_shaft
; p0_perp_plus = p0 + perp*0.015
%p0_perp_plus = OpFAdd %v3float %p0 %perp_scaled_shaft
; mid_perp_minus = mid - perp*0.015
%mid_perp_minus = OpFSub %v3float %mid %perp_scaled_shaft
; mid_perp_plus = mid + perp*0.015
%mid_perp_plus = OpFAdd %v3float %mid %perp_scaled_shaft

; Emit shaft as triangle strip (4 verts): p0±perp*0.015, mid±perp*0.015. EndPrimitive.
; Vert 1: p0_perp_minus (with 1.0 for w in gl_Position)
%p0_perp_minus_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %p0_perp_minus %float_1_0
%gl_Position_p0_perp_minus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_p0_perp_minus %p0_perp_minus_v4
%outColor_p0_perp_minus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_p0_perp_minus %c0
OpEmitVertex

; Vert 2: p0_perp_plus
%p0_perp_plus_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %p0_perp_plus %float_1_0
%gl_Position_p0_perp_plus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_p0_perp_plus %p0_perp_plus_v4
%outColor_p0_perp_plus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_p0_perp_plus %c0
OpEmitVertex

; Vert 3: mid_perp_minus
%mid_perp_minus_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mid_perp_minus %float_1_0
%gl_Position_mid_perp_minus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_mid_perp_minus %mid_perp_minus_v4
%outColor_mid_perp_minus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_mid_perp_minus %c0
OpEmitVertex

; Vert 4: mid_perp_plus
%mid_perp_plus_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mid_perp_plus %float_1_0
%gl_Position_mid_perp_plus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_mid_perp_plus %mid_perp_plus_v4
%outColor_mid_perp_plus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_mid_perp_plus %c0
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Emit arrowhead as triangle strip (3 verts) with color c1
; Calculate perp * 0.05
%perp_scaled_arrow = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp_3d %float_0_05

; Arrowhead base plus: mid + perp*0.05
%arrow_base_plus = OpFAdd %v3float %mid %perp_scaled_arrow
; Arrowhead base minus: mid - perp*0.05
%arrow_base_minus = OpFSub %v3float %mid %perp_scaled_arrow

; Vert 1: arrow_base_minus
%arrow_base_minus_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %arrow_base_minus %float_1_0
%gl_Position_arrow_base_minus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_arrow_base_minus %arrow_base_minus_v4
%outColor_arrow_base_minus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_arrow_base_minus %c1
OpEmitVertex

; Vert 2: arrow_base_plus
%arrow_base_plus_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %arrow_base_plus %float_1_0
%gl_Position_arrow_base_plus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_arrow_base_plus %arrow_base_plus_v4
%outColor_arrow_base_plus = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_arrow_base_plus %c1
OpEmitVertex

; Vert 3: p1 (tip)
%p1_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %p1 %float_1_0
%gl_Position_p1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v4float %gl_Position %uint_0
OpStore %gl_Position_p1 %p1_v4
%outColor_p1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_Output_v3float %outColor %uint_0
OpStore %outColor_p1 %c1
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; All types, constants, and global variables
%void = OpTypeVoid

%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%ptr_input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_3
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%_ = OpVariable %ptr_output_gl_PerVertex Output ; gl_out

%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3float Output

%ptr_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%ptr_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%ptr_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

%v4float_0_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0
%v3float_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0
%v4float_0_0_0_1 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_1_0

%float_inv_3 = OpConstant %float 0.33333334
%v3float_inv_3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_inv_3 %float_inv_3 %float_inv_3

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_function
%entry = OpLabel

; Load input positions and colors
%idx0 = OpConstant %int 0
%idx1 = OpConstant %int 1
%idx2 = OpConstant %int 2

%ptr_gl_in_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_gl_PerVertex %gl_in %idx0
%load_gl_in_0 = OpLoad %gl_PerVertex_in %ptr_gl_in_0
%pos0_v4 = OpCompositeExtract %v4float %load_gl_in_0 0
%pos0_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos0_v4 %pos0_v4 0 1 2

%ptr_gl_in_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_gl_PerVertex %gl_in %idx1
%load_gl_in_1 = OpLoad %gl_PerVertex_in %ptr_gl_in_1
%pos1_v4 = OpCompositeExtract %v4float %load_gl_in_1 0
%pos1_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos1_v4 %pos1_v4 0 1 2

%ptr_gl_in_2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_gl_PerVertex %gl_in %idx2
%load_gl_in_2 = OpLoad %gl_PerVertex_in %ptr_gl_in_2
%pos2_v4 = OpCompositeExtract %v4float %load_gl_in_2 0
%pos2_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos2_v4 %pos2_v4 0 1 2

%ptr_color_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %idx0
%col0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_0
%ptr_color_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %idx1
%col1 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_1
%ptr_color_2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %idx2
%col2 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_2

; Compute face center
%sum_pos = OpFAdd %v3float %pos0_v3 %pos1_v3
%sum_pos_2 = OpFAdd %v3float %sum_pos %pos2_v3
%center_v3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %sum_pos_2 %float_inv_3

; Compute face normal
%e1 = OpFSub %v3float %pos1_v3 %pos0_v3
%e2 = OpFSub %v3float %pos2_v3 %pos0_v3
%cross_e1_e2 = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Cross %e1 %e2
%normal_v3 = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_std_450 Normalize %cross_e1_e2

; Compute offset
%offset_v3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %normal_v3 %float_0_08
%offset_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %offset_v3 %float_0_0

; Emit vertices
; Vertex 0
%new_pos0_v4 = OpFAdd %v4float %pos0_v4 %offset_v4
%ptr_gl_out_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4float %_ %int_0
OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos %new_pos0_v4
OpStore %outColor %col0
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1
%new_pos1_v4 = OpFAdd %v4float %pos1_v4 %offset_v4
OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos %new_pos1_v4
OpStore %outColor %col1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
%new_pos2_v4 = OpFAdd %v4float %pos2_v4 %offset_v4
OpStore %ptr_gl_out_pos %new_pos2_v4
OpStore %outColor %col2
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 10

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_PerVertex_in %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_PerVertex_out %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip

OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug info (optional, but good practice for clarity)
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex_in"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_in 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %color "color"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_in DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %gl_in Binding 0 ; Should be 0, not relevant for input though.
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %color Location 2
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_out DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %gl_out Binding 0
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO Decorations
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 48
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 80
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_0_025 = OpConstant %float 0.025

; Pointer Types
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_uniform_m4v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %m4v4float
%ptr_uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_uniform_v3float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v3float ; Assuming lightPos/cameraPos are vec3 in UBO, or need vec4

; Input gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; Output gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; Input User-defined
%arr_v3float_4 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_4
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input

; Output User-defined
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - same as test 41
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4v4float %m4v4float %m4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float ; model, view, proj, lightPos, cameraPos, params
%ptr_uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ubo_var = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_UBO Uniform

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%float_n1 = OpConstant %float -1.0

%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel
; Get input positions
%ptr_pos_0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos_0 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_pos_0
%ptr_pos_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
%pos_1 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_pos_1
%ptr_pos_2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%pos_2 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_pos_2
%ptr_pos_3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_3 %int_0
%pos_3 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_pos_3

; Get input colors
%ptr_color_1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_1
%color_1 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_1
%ptr_color_2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_2
%color_2 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_2

; Compute tangent at start: t0 = normalize(pos_2.xyz - pos_0.xyz)
%pos_2_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos_2 %pos_2 %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
%pos_0_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos_0 %pos_0 %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
%diff_t0 = OpFSub %v3float %pos_2_xyz %pos_0_xyz
%t0 = OpNormalize %v3float %diff_t0

; Compute tangent at end: t1 = normalize(pos_3.xyz - pos_1.xyz)
%pos_3_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos_3 %pos_3 %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
%pos_1_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos_1 %pos_1 %int_0 %int_1 %int_2
%diff_t1 = OpFSub %v3float %pos_3_xyz %pos_1_xyz
%t1 = OpNormalize %v3float %diff_t1

; Compute perpendiculars: perp0 = vec2(-t0.y, t0.x), perp1 = vec2(-t1.y, t1.x)
%t0_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %t0 %int_1
%t0_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %t0 %int_0
%neg_t0_y = OpFNegate %float %t0_y
%perp0_vec2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_t0_y %t0_x

%t1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %t1 %int_1
%t1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %t1 %int_0
%neg_t1_y = OpFNegate %float %t1_y
%perp1_vec2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_t1_y %t1_x

; Thickness = 0.025
%scaled_perp0_vec2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp0_vec2 %float_0_025
%scaled_perp1_vec2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %perp1_vec2 %float_0_025

; Convert 2D perpendiculars to 4D for position addition
%perp0_4d = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %scaled_perp0_vec2 %float_0 %float_0
%perp1_4d = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %scaled_perp1_vec2 %float_0 %float_0

; start_pos = pos_1, end_pos = pos_2
; Vertex 1: start_pos + perp0_4d
%v1_pos = OpFAdd %v4float %pos_1 %perp0_4d
; Vertex 2: start_pos - perp0_4d
%v2_pos = OpFSub %v4float %pos_1 %perp0_4d
; Vertex 3: end_pos + perp1_4d
%v3_pos = OpFAdd %v4float %pos_2 %perp1_4d
; Vertex 4: end_pos - perp1_4d
%v4_pos = OpFSub %v4float %pos_2 %perp1_4d

; Emit vertices
; Vertex 1
%ptr_out_pos_v1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %ptr_out_pos_v1 %v1_pos
%ptr_out_color_v1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v3 %outColor
OpStore %ptr_out_color_v1 %color_1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
%ptr_out_pos_v2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %ptr_out_pos_v2 %v2_pos
%ptr_out_color_v2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v3 %outColor
OpStore %ptr_out_color_v2 %color_1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3
%ptr_out_pos_v3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %ptr_out_pos_v3 %v3_pos
%ptr_out_color_v3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v3 %outColor
OpStore %ptr_out_color_v3 %color_2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4
%ptr_out_pos_v4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %ptr_out_pos_v4 %v4_pos
%ptr_out_color_v4 = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v3 %outColor
OpStore %ptr_out_color_v4 %color_2
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Thick Bezier Curve (line_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (8142 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google LunarG Shader Compiler; 10
; Capabilities:
;   Geometry
;   Shader
; Extensions:
;   SPV_KHR_shader_ballot
;   SPV_KHR_subgroup_vote
;   SPV_KHR_shader_draw_parameters
;   SPV_KHR_16bit_storage
;   SPV_KHR_variable_pointers
;   SPV_KHR_spirv_1_4
;
; Task: Geometry shader for rendering a thick smooth curve with adjacency.

OpCapability Shader
OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_Position_out %outColor_out %ubo_instance
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 10
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"

OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos_in"
OpName %normal_in "normal_in"
OpName %color_in "color_in"
OpName %gl_Position_out "gl_Position_out"
OpName %outColor_out "outColor_out"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "proj"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo_instance "ubo_instance"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_in ArrayStride 16
OpDecorate %gl_in BuiltIn PerVertex
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %worldPos_in ArrayStride 12
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %normal_in ArrayStride 12
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
OpDecorate %color_in ArrayStride 12

OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_Position_out BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %outColor_out Location 0

OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo_instance DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_instance Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4float = OpTypeMatrix %float 4

%_ptr_Function_int = OpTypePointer Function %int
%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_4
%ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in
%arr_v3float_4 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_4

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %m4float %m4float %m4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_4_0 = OpConstant %float 4
%float_0_02 = OpConstant %float 0.02
%float_0_25 = OpConstant %float 0.25
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75

%v4float_0_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
%v3float_0_0_1_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_0 %float_1
%v3float_0_1_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_1 %float_0

; Global Variables
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_gl_PerVertex_in Input
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float_4 Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float_4 Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_Input_arr_v3float_4 Input
%gl_Position_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output
%outColor_out = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v3float Output
%ubo_instance = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform







%main = OpFunction %void None %void
%main_label = OpLabel
  %i = OpVariable %_ptr_Function_int Function
  OpStore %i %int_0

  ; Loop for 5 sub-segments
  OpBranch %loop_header
%loop_header = OpLabel
  %loop_cond = OpSLessThan %bool (OpLoad %int %i) %int_5
  OpLoopMerge %loop_merge %loop_continue %loop_cond
  OpBranchConditional %loop_cond %loop_body %loop_merge

%loop_body = OpLabel
    %t_int = OpLoad %int %i
    %t_float = OpConvertUToF %float %t_int
    %t = OpFDiv %float %t_float %float_4_0

    ; Load P0, P1, P2, P3 from gl_in
    %idx_0 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
    %P0_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %idx_0
    %idx_1 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
    %P1_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %idx_1
    %idx_2 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
    %P2_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %idx_2
    %idx_3 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %gl_in %int_3 %int_0
    %P3_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %idx_3

    ; P_current = P1 * (1-t) + P2 * t
    %one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %float_1 %t
    %P1_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %P1_v4 %one_minus_t
    %P2_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %P2_v4 %t
    %P_current = OpFAdd %v4float %P1_scaled %P2_scaled

    ; Tangent calculation using xyz components
    %P0_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %P0_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
    %P1_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %P1_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
    %P2_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %P2_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2
    %P3_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %P3_v4 %v4float_0_0_0_0 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2

    %tangent_start = OpFSub %v3float %P2_xyz %P0_xyz
    %tangent_end = OpFSub %v3float %P3_xyz %P1_xyz
    %tangent_start_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %tangent_start %one_minus_t
    %tangent_end_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %tangent_end %t
    %tangent_current = OpFAdd %v3float %tangent_start_scaled %tangent_end_scaled
    %normalized_tangent_current = OpNormalize %v3float %tangent_current

    ; Perpendicular calculation
    ; A simple, robust perpendicular for a 3D vector V:
    ; P = cross(V, (0,1,0)) if V is not (0,1,0) parallel
    ; else P = cross(V, (0,0,1))
    ; To avoid branching, we can try to derive a perpendicular.
    ; For a tangent T, a vector orthogonal to T and (0,1,0) is cross(T, (0,1,0)).
    ; If T is parallel to (0,1,0), this would be zero.
    ; Let's use a simpler approach assuming the curve is mostly on XY.
    %up_vector = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_0 %float_1
    %perp_direction_raw = OpCrossProduct %v3float %normalized_tangent_current %up_vector
    %perp_direction = OpNormalize %v3float %perp_direction_raw
    %perp_scaled_xyz = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp_direction %float_0_02
    %perp_scaled = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %perp_scaled_xyz %float_0

    ; Color interpolation
    %color_1_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_1
    %color_1 = OpLoad %v3float %color_1_ptr
    %color_2_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color_in %int_2
    %color_2 = OpLoad %v3float %color_2_ptr
    %current_color_scaled_1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color_1 %one_minus_t
    %current_color_scaled_2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %color_2 %t
    %current_color = OpFAdd %v3float %current_color_scaled_1 %current_color_scaled_2

    ; Emit vertices: P_current + perp_scaled
    %pos_plus_perp = OpFAdd %v4float %P_current %perp_scaled
    OpStore %gl_Position_out %pos_plus_perp
    OpStore %outColor_out %current_color
    OpEmitVertex

    ; Emit vertices: P_current - perp_scaled
    %pos_minus_perp = OpFSub %v4float %P_current %perp_scaled
    OpStore %gl_Position_out %pos_minus_perp
    OpStore %outColor_out %current_color
    OpEmitVertex

%loop_continue = OpLabel
  %next_i = OpIAdd %int %t_int %int_1
  OpStore %i %next_i
  OpBranch %loop_header

%loop_merge = OpLabel
  OpEndPrimitive
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (12082 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL; 14
; Capabilities: Geometry
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; All types and constants first
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%m4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_8 = OpConstant %uint 8
%uint_16 = OpConstant %uint 16
%uint_32 = OpConstant %uint 32
%uint_N = OpConstant %uint 4 ; InputLinesAdjacency has 4 vertices

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_02 = OpConstant %float 0.02 ; Thickness

%float_0_333 = OpConstant %float 0.33333334
%float_0_666 = OpConstant %float 0.6666667
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_2_0 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%float_N0_5 = OpConstant %float -0.5

%ptr_function_float = OpTypePointer Function %float
%ptr_function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%ptr_function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float

; gl_PerVertex for input
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block

%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float ; Pointer type for gl_in[i].gl_Position

; User-defined inputs
%arr_v3float_N = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_N

%ptr_input_v3float_arr = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_N
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3float_arr Input
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3float_arr Input
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3float_arr Input

OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; gl_PerVertex for output
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block

%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; User-defined output
%ptr_output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO (set=0, binding=0) - same as test 41
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3

%Uniforms = OpTypeStruct %m4v4float %m4v4float %m4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
;         0: model        1: view         2: proj         3: lightPos    4: cameraPos   5: params
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %Uniforms 5 Offset 224

OpDecorate %Uniforms Block

%ptr_ubo_Uniforms = OpTypePointer Uniform %Uniforms
%ubo_data = OpVariable %ptr_ubo_Uniforms Uniform
OpDecorate %ubo_data DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_data Binding 0

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%entry = OpLabel

; Entry point and execution modes
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %outColor %ubo_data
OpExecutionMode %main InputLinesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices %uint_8
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations %uint_1

; --- Function body for main starts here ---

; 1. Read start = gl_in[1].gl_Position, end = gl_in[2].gl_Position.
%idx1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_1 %uint_0
%pos1_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %idx1
%pos1_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos1_v4 %pos1_v4 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2 ; extract xyz

%idx2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %uint_2 %uint_0
%pos2_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %idx2
%pos2_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %pos2_v4 %pos2_v4 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2 ; extract xyz

; Read worldPos for calculation of tangents
%worldPos0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float_arr %worldPos_in %uint_0
%worldPos0 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos0_ptr
%worldPos1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float_arr %worldPos_in %uint_1
%worldPos1 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos1_ptr
%worldPos2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float_arr %worldPos_in %uint_2
%worldPos2 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos2_ptr
%worldPos3_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float_arr %worldPos_in %uint_3
%worldPos3 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos3_ptr

; Read colors for interpolation
%color1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float_arr %color_in %uint_1
%color1 = OpLoad %v3float %color1_ptr
%color2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float_arr %color_in %uint_2
%color2 = OpLoad %v3float %color2_ptr

; 2. Compute adjacency tangents for smooth perpendiculars.
; This is similar to a smooth thick curve, where we compute a direction vector
; and a perpendicular vector using the adjacent points.

; Calculate segment direction
%segment_dir = OpFSub %v3float %pos2_v3 %pos1_v3
; %norm_segment_dir = OpNormalize %v3float %segment_dir ; Not directly used, but good to have for understanding

; Calculate tangents at pos1 and pos2 using adjacency
; Tangent at pos1 (p1 - p0) + (p2 - p1) normalized
%dir_p0p1 = OpFSub %v3float %pos1_v3 %worldPos0 ; worldPos0 is P0 from input
%dir_p1p2 = OpFSub %v3float %pos2_v3 %pos1_v3
%tangent1_unnorm = OpFAdd %v3float %dir_p0p1 %dir_p1p2
%tangent1 = OpNormalize %v3float %tangent1_unnorm

; Tangent at pos2 (p2 - p1) + (p3 - p2) normalized
%dir_p2p3 = OpFSub %v3float %worldPos3 %pos2_v3 ; worldPos3 is P3 from input
%tangent2_unnorm = OpFAdd %v3float %dir_p1p2 %dir_p2p3
%tangent2 = OpNormalize %v3float %tangent2_unnorm

; Perpendiculars - using cross product with view direction (assuming Z up or similar for 2D line in 3D space)
; For 2D lines, cross product with (0,0,1) or (0,1,0) gives a perpendicular vector.
; For a general case, we need a "up" vector or view direction.
; Let's assume view is along Z-axis for simplicity, or grab it from UBO if available.
; The problem states "same as smooth thick curve", so I will use approach from
; common thick line rendering: use a camera vector (or dummy) to compute perpendiculars.
; Let's retrieve cameraPos from UBO to create a view vector.

%ubo_cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_ubo_Uniforms %ubo_data %uint_4
%ubo_cameraPos_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %ubo_cameraPos_ptr
%ubo_cameraPos_v3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %ubo_cameraPos_v4 %ubo_cameraPos_v4 %uint_0 %uint_1 %uint_2

; Determine a stable "up" vector for the cross product
; If tangent is parallel to view, cross product is zero.
; A common approach is to use a fixed "up" vector, e.g., (0,1,0) and adjust.
; For 2D lines in 3D, a robust perpendicular can be calculated by
; rotating the tangent by 90 degrees around the up vector, or by
; `normalize(cross(tangent, some_arbitrary_vector))`
; Here, given "smooth perpendiculars", the standard way is:
; `perp = normalize(cross(tangent, view_direction))`
; If tangent is aligned with view, we need a fallback.
; Let's define a general up vector for cross product.
%v3float_up = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_1 %float_0 ; (0,1,0) as a general up vector

%perp1_unnorm = OpCrossProduct %v3float %tangent1 %v3float_up
%perp1 = OpNormalize %v3float %perp1_unnorm

%perp2_unnorm = OpCrossProduct %v3float %tangent2 %v3float_up
%perp2 = OpNormalize %v3float %perp2_unnorm

; If perp1 or perp2 is zero vector (tangent parallel to up), use a fallback perpendicular.
; Fallback: cross product with (1,0,0) if (0,1,0) failed.
; This is getting complex for direct SPIR-V. For simplicity, assuming perp is not zero.
; In a real scenario, this would involve a conditional.
; For now, I will proceed with the assumption that cross product is not zero.

; Scale perpendiculars by thickness
%scaled_perp1 = OpFMul %v3float %perp1 %float_0_02
%scaled_perp2 = OpFMul %v3float %perp2 %float_0_02

; 3. Split the segment into 3 equal parts.
; pA = pos1_v3 + (pos2_v3 - pos1_v3) * 1/3
; pB = pos1_v3 + (pos2_v3 - pos1_v3) * 2/3
%diff = OpFSub %v3float %pos2_v3 %pos1_v3

%pA_part = OpFMul %v3float %diff %float_0_333
%pA = OpFAdd %v3float %pos1_v3 %pA_part

%pB_part = OpFMul %v3float %diff %float_0_666
%pB = OpFAdd %v3float %pos1_v3 %pB_part

; Tangents at pA and pB. Simple linear interpolation of tangent1 and tangent2.
%one_minus_t_0_333 = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %float_0_333
%tangentA_interp_part1 = OpFMul %v3float %tangent1 %one_minus_t_0_333
%tangentA_interp_part2 = OpFMul %v3float %tangent2 %float_0_333
%tangentA_unnorm_interp = OpFAdd %v3float %tangentA_interp_part1 %tangentA_interp_part2
%tangentA = OpNormalize %v3float %tangentA_unnorm_interp

%one_minus_t_0_666 = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %float_0_666
%tangentB_interp_part1 = OpFMul %v3float %tangent1 %one_minus_t_0_666
%tangentB_interp_part2 = OpFMul %v3float %tangent2 %float_0_666
%tangentB_unnorm_interp = OpFAdd %v3float %tangentB_interp_part1 %tangentB_interp_part2
%tangentB = OpNormalize %v3float %tangentB_unnorm_interp

; Perpendiculars at pA and pB
%perpA_unnorm = OpCrossProduct %v3float %tangentA %v3float_up
%perpA = OpNormalize %v3float %perpA_unnorm
%scaled_perpA = OpFMul %v3float %perpA %float_0_02

%perpB_unnorm = OpCrossProduct %v3float %tangentB %v3float_up
%perpB = OpNormalize %v3float %perpB_unnorm
%scaled_perpB = OpFMul %v3float %perpB %float_0_02

; Interpolate colors
%colorA_interp_part1 = OpFMul %v3float %color1 %one_minus_t_0_333
%colorA_interp_part2 = OpFMul %v3float %color2 %float_0_333
%colorA = OpFAdd %v3float %colorA_interp_part1 %colorA_interp_part2

%colorB_interp_part1 = OpFMul %v3float %color1 %one_minus_t_0_666
%colorB_interp_part2 = OpFMul %v3float %color2 %float_0_666
%colorB = OpFAdd %v3float %colorB_interp_part1 %colorB_interp_part2


; --- Emit 1st part (pos1_v3 to pA) ---
; Vertices for first quad:
; pos1_v3 - scaled_perp1
; pos1_v3 + scaled_perp1
; pA - scaled_perpA
; pA + scaled_perpA

; Vertex 0: pos1_v3 - scaled_perp1
%v0_pos_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %pos1_v3 %scaled_perp1
%v0_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v0_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v0_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: pos1_v3 + scaled_perp1
%v1_pos_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %pos1_v3 %scaled_perp1
%v1_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v1_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v1_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %color1
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: pA - scaled_perpA
%v2_pos_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %pA %scaled_perpA
%v2_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v2_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v2_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %colorA
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 3: pA + scaled_perpA
%v3_pos_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %pA %scaled_perpA
%v3_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v3_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v3_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %colorA
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; --- Emit 3rd part (pB to pos2_v3) ---
; Vertices for second quad:
; pB - scaled_perpB
; pB + scaled_perpB
; pos2_v3 - scaled_perp2
; pos2_v3 + scaled_perp2

; Vertex 4: pB - scaled_perpB
%v4_pos_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %pB %scaled_perpB
%v4_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v4_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v4_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %colorB
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 5: pB + scaled_perpB
%v5_pos_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %pB %scaled_perpB
%v5_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v5_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v5_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %colorB
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 6: pos2_v3 - scaled_perp2
%v6_pos_v3 = OpFSub %v3float %pos2_v3 %scaled_perp2
%v6_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v6_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v6_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 7: pos2_v3 + scaled_perp2
%v7_pos_v3 = OpFAdd %v3float %pos2_v3 %scaled_perp2
%v7_pos_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %v7_pos_v3 %float_1_0
OpStore %gl_out %v7_pos_v4
OpStore %outColor %color2
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; --- Function body for main ends here ---

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over GLSL 4.50
; Capabilities: Geometry
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- Type Definitions ---
%void = OpTypeVoid
%void_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_5 = OpConstant %uint 5
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6
%uint_15 = OpConstant %uint 15

%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4
%int_5 = OpConstant %int 5
%int_6 = OpConstant %int 6

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_015 = OpConstant %float 0.015
%float_0_0075 = OpConstant %float 0.0075 ; 0.015 / 2.0

%v3float_0_0_0 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0
%v3float_1_1_1 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0

; gl_PerVertex input/output structure
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block

%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block

; Array types for input/output
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6 ; InputTrianglesAdjacency has 6 vertices
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in

%ptr_in_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%arr_v3float_6 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6

%ptr_out_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_out_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

; --- Interface Variables ---
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input ; Pointer to an element, we'll access array through index
OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0 ; layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[];
%normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input
OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1 ; layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[];
%color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input
OpDecorate %color_in Location 2 ; layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[];

%gl_Position_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4float Output
OpBuiltIn %gl_Position_out Position ; This is for single gl_Position, not a block
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0 ; layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor;

; --- Main function ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
OpLabel %main_label

; Execution modes
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_Position_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices %uint_15
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; --- Global Variables --- (moved to interface variables)

; --- Function Body ---

; Helper function for emitting a vertex
; void emit_vertex(vec4 position, vec3 color)
%emit_vertex_fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void %v4float %v3float
%emit_vertex = OpFunction %void None %emit_vertex_fn_type
%position_param = OpFunctionParameter %v4float
%color_param = OpFunctionParameter %v3float
%emit_label = OpLabel
  OpStore %gl_Position_out %position_param
  OpStore %outColor %color_param
  OpEmitVertex
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; --- Main Geometry Shader Logic ---
; Emit original triangle with dimmed colors
%v0_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%v0_pos = OpLoad %v4float %v0_pos_ptr
%v2_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
%v2_pos = OpLoad %v4float %v2_pos_ptr
%v4_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4float %gl_in %int_4 %int_0
%v4_pos = OpLoad %v4float %v4_pos_ptr

%v0_color_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color_in %int_0
%v0_color = OpLoad %v3float %v0_color_ptr
%v2_color_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color_in %int_2
%v2_color = OpLoad %v3float %v2_color_ptr
%v4_color_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3float %color_in %int_4
%v4_color = OpLoad %v3float %v4_color_ptr

%v0_color_dim = OpFMul %v3float %v0_color %float_0_3
%v2_color_dim = OpFMul %v3float %v2_color %float_0_3
%v4_color_dim = OpFMul %v3float %v4_color %float_0_3

  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v0_pos %v0_color_dim
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v2_pos %v2_color_dim
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v4_pos %v4_color_dim
  OpEndPrimitive

; Emit thick lines for all 3 edges (simplified approach)
; Edge 0-2 (vertices 0 and 2 from gl_in)
; Edge 2-4 (vertices 2 and 4 from gl_in)
; Edge 4-0 (vertices 4 and 0 from gl_in)

; Thickness of 0.015, half thickness 0.0075

; Edge 0-2
%edge02_dir = OpFSub %v4float %v2_pos %v0_pos
%edge02_perp_xy = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_dir %uint_1) ; -dir.y
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_dir %uint_0) ; dir.x
    ; Invert y-component for perpendicular
%neg_edge02_dir_y = OpFNegate %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_dir %uint_1)
%edge02_perp_xy_corrected = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_edge02_dir_y (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_dir %uint_0)

; Normalize perpendicular vector
%edge02_perp_len_sq = OpDot %float %edge02_perp_xy_corrected %edge02_perp_xy_corrected
%edge02_perp_len = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %edge02_perp_len_sq
%edge02_perp_norm_x = OpFDiv %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_perp_xy_corrected %uint_0) %edge02_perp_len
%edge02_perp_norm_y = OpFDiv %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_perp_xy_corrected %uint_1) %edge02_perp_len
%edge02_perp_norm_v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %edge02_perp_norm_x %edge02_perp_norm_y

; Scale by half thickness
%edge02_offset_xy = OpFMul %v2float %edge02_perp_norm_v2 %float_0_0075

; Construct 4-component offset vectors
%offset02_p = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_offset_xy %uint_0) ; x
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge02_offset_xy %uint_1) ; y
    %float_0_0 ; z
    %float_0_0 ; w
%offset02_n = OpFNegate %v4float %offset02_p

; Emit quad for edge 0-2
; v0 - offset, v0 + offset, v2 - offset, v2 + offset
%v0_pos_m_off = OpFSub %v4float %v0_pos %offset02_n
%v0_pos_p_off = OpFAdd %v4float %v0_pos %offset02_n
%v2_pos_m_off = OpFSub %v4float %v2_pos %offset02_n
%v2_pos_p_off = OpFAdd %v4float %v2_pos %offset02_n

  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v0_pos_m_off %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v0_pos_p_off %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v2_pos_m_off %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v2_pos_p_off %v3float_1_1_1
  OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 2-4
%edge24_dir = OpFSub %v4float %v4_pos %v2_pos
%neg_edge24_dir_y = OpFNegate %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge24_dir %uint_1)
%edge24_perp_xy_corrected = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_edge24_dir_y (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge24_dir %uint_0)

%edge24_perp_len_sq = OpDot %float %edge24_perp_xy_corrected %edge24_perp_xy_corrected
%edge24_perp_len = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %edge24_perp_len_sq
%edge24_perp_norm_x = OpFDiv %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge24_perp_xy_corrected %uint_0) %edge24_perp_len
%edge24_perp_norm_y = OpFDiv %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge24_perp_xy_corrected %uint_1) %edge24_perp_len
%edge24_perp_norm_v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %edge24_perp_norm_x %edge24_perp_norm_y

%edge24_offset_xy = OpFMul %v2float %edge24_perp_norm_v2 %float_0_0075

%offset24_p = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge24_offset_xy %uint_0)
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge24_offset_xy %uint_1)
    %float_0_0
    %float_0_0
%offset24_n = OpFNegate %v4float %offset24_p

%v2_pos_m_off_2 = OpFSub %v4float %v2_pos %offset24_n
%v2_pos_p_off_2 = OpFAdd %v4float %v2_pos %offset24_n
%v4_pos_m_off_2 = OpFSub %v4float %v4_pos %offset24_n
%v4_pos_p_off_2 = OpFAdd %v4float %v4_pos %offset24_n

  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v2_pos_m_off_2 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v2_pos_p_off_2 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v4_pos_m_off_2 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v4_pos_p_off_2 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 4-0
%edge40_dir = OpFSub %v4float %v0_pos %v4_pos
%neg_edge40_dir_y = OpFNegate %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge40_dir %uint_1)
%edge40_perp_xy_corrected = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_edge40_dir_y (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge40_dir %uint_0)

%edge40_perp_len_sq = OpDot %float %edge40_perp_xy_corrected %edge40_perp_xy_corrected
%edge40_perp_len = OpExtInst %float %GLSLstd450 Sqrt %edge40_perp_len_sq
%edge40_perp_norm_x = OpFDiv %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge40_perp_xy_corrected %uint_0) %edge40_perp_len
%edge40_perp_norm_y = OpFDiv %float (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge40_perp_xy_corrected %uint_1) %edge40_perp_len
%edge40_perp_norm_v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %edge40_perp_norm_x %edge40_perp_norm_y

%edge40_offset_xy = OpFMul %v2float %edge40_perp_norm_v2 %float_0_0075

%offset40_p = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge40_offset_xy %uint_0)
    (OpVectorExtractDynamic %float %edge40_offset_xy %uint_1)
    %float_0_0
    %float_0_0
%offset40_n = OpFNegate %v4float %offset40_p

%v4_pos_m_off_3 = OpFSub %v4float %v4_pos %offset40_n
%v4_pos_p_off_3 = OpFAdd %v4float %v4_pos %offset40_n
%v0_pos_m_off_3 = OpFSub %v4float %v0_pos %offset40_n
%v0_pos_p_off_3 = OpFAdd %v4float %v0_pos %offset40_n

  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v4_pos_m_off_3 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v4_pos_p_off_3 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v0_pos_m_off_3 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpCall %void %emit_vertex %v0_pos_p_off_3 %v3float_1_1_1
  OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (9548 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc; 2024-05-18
; Capabilities: Geometry
; Memory Model: Logical GLSL450
; Entry Point: main
; Execution Modes: InputTrianglesAdjacency, OutputTriangleStrip, OutputVertices 12, Invocations 1

OpCapability Geometry
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpSource GLSL 450

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%ptr_void = OpTypePointer Function %void
%ptr_int = OpTypePointer Function %int
%ptr_float = OpTypePointer Function %float

%ptr_input_int = OpTypePointer Input %int
%ptr_input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

%ptr_output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%ptr_function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%ptr_function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float

%ptr_uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%ptr_uniform_mat4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %mat4

; Constants
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%uint_0 = OpConstant %uint 0
%uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
%uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%uint_4 = OpConstant %uint 4
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6 ; InputTrianglesAdjacency has 6 vertices
%uint_12 = OpConstant %uint 12 ; OutputVertices for 3 quads * 4 verts

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_008 = OpConstant %float 0.008
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_minus_1_0 = OpConstant %float -1.0

; Function types
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void

; UBO definition
%type_ubo_params = OpTypeVector %float 4
%type_ubo_struct = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %type_ubo_params

OpDecorate %type_ubo_struct Block
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %type_ubo_struct 5 Offset 224

%ptr_uniform_ubo_struct = OpTypePointer Uniform %type_ubo_struct
%ubo_data = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_ubo_struct Uniform

OpDecorate %ubo_data DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_data Binding 0

; Input gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block

%arr_gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Input %arr_gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_gl_PerVertex Input

; User-defined inputs
%arr_v3float_6 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%ptr_input_arr_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_6

%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0

%normal = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %normal Location 1

%color = OpVariable %ptr_input_arr_v3float Input
OpDecorate %color Location 2

; Output gl_PerVertex
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block

%ptr_output_gl_PerVertex = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_output_gl_PerVertex Output

; User-defined output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_output_v3float Output
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%entry_point_label = OpLabel

; Execution modes
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices %uint_12
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations %uint_1

; Edge indices for main triangle vertices
%v0_idx = OpConstant %int 0
%v2_idx = OpConstant %int 2
%v4_idx = OpConstant %int 4

; Store float 0, 1, 0, 0 for vector construction
%v4float_0000 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0 %float_0_0

; Loop for each edge
; Edge 1: (0, 2)
%p1_ptr_e1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %v0_idx %int_0
%p2_ptr_e1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %v2_idx %int_0
%c1_ptr_e1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %v0_idx
%c2_ptr_e1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %v2_idx

%p1_clip_e1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr_e1
%p2_clip_e1 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr_e1
%c1_val_e1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr_e1
%c2_val_e1 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr_e1

%avg_color_add_e1 = OpFAdd %v3float %c1_val_e1 %c2_val_e1
%avg_color_e1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %avg_color_add_e1 %float_0_5

%edge_vec_clip_e1 = OpFSub %v4float %p2_clip_e1 %p1_clip_e1
%edge_vec_norm_e1 = OpNormalize %v4float %edge_vec_clip_e1

%edge_vec_norm_x_e1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %edge_vec_norm_e1 %int_0
%edge_vec_norm_y_e1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %edge_vec_norm_e1 %int_1

%perp_x_e1 = OpFNegate %float %edge_vec_norm_y_e1
%perp_y_e1 = %edge_vec_norm_x_e1

%scaled_perp_x_e1 = OpFMul %float %perp_x_e1 %float_0_008
%scaled_perp_y_e1 = OpFMul %float %perp_y_e1 %float_0_008

%scaled_perp_clip_e1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %scaled_perp_x_e1 %scaled_perp_y_e1 %float_0_0 %float_0_0

%v_quad1_e1 = OpFAdd %v4float %p1_clip_e1 %scaled_perp_clip_e1
%v_quad2_e1 = OpFSub %v4float %p1_clip_e1 %scaled_perp_clip_e1
%v_quad3_e1 = OpFAdd %v4float %p2_clip_e1 %scaled_perp_clip_e1
%v_quad4_e1 = OpFSub %v4float %p2_clip_e1 %scaled_perp_clip_e1

%gl_out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad1_e1
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad2_e1
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad3_e1
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e1
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad4_e1
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e1
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 2: (2, 4)
%p1_ptr_e2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %v2_idx %int_0
%p2_ptr_e2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %v4_idx %int_0
%c1_ptr_e2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %v2_idx
%c2_ptr_e2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %v4_idx

%p1_clip_e2 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr_e2
%p2_clip_e2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr_e2
%c1_val_e2 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr_e2
%c2_val_e2 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr_e2

%avg_color_add_e2 = OpFAdd %v3float %c1_val_e2 %c2_val_e2
%avg_color_e2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %avg_color_add_e2 %float_0_5

%edge_vec_clip_e2 = OpFSub %v4float %p2_clip_e2 %p1_clip_e2
%edge_vec_norm_e2 = OpNormalize %v4float %edge_vec_clip_e2

%edge_vec_norm_x_e2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %edge_vec_norm_e2 %int_0
%edge_vec_norm_y_e2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %edge_vec_norm_e2 %int_1

%perp_x_e2 = OpFNegate %float %edge_vec_norm_y_e2
%perp_y_e2 = %edge_vec_norm_x_e2

%scaled_perp_x_e2 = OpFMul %float %perp_x_e2 %float_0_008
%scaled_perp_y_e2 = OpFMul %float %perp_y_e2 %float_0_008

%scaled_perp_clip_e2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %scaled_perp_x_e2 %scaled_perp_y_e2 %float_0_0 %float_0_0

%v_quad1_e2 = OpFAdd %v4float %p1_clip_e2 %scaled_perp_clip_e2
%v_quad2_e2 = OpFSub %v4float %p1_clip_e2 %scaled_perp_clip_e2
%v_quad3_e2 = OpFAdd %v4float %p2_clip_e2 %scaled_perp_clip_e2
%v_quad4_e2 = OpFSub %v4float %p2_clip_e2 %scaled_perp_clip_e2

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad1_e2
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e2
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad2_e2
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e2
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad3_e2
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e2
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad4_e2
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e2
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

; Edge 3: (4, 0)
%p1_ptr_e3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %v4_idx %int_0
%p2_ptr_e3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v4float %gl_in %v0_idx %int_0
%c1_ptr_e3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %v4_idx
%c2_ptr_e3 = OpAccessChain %ptr_input_v3float %color %v0_idx

%p1_clip_e3 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr_e3
%p2_clip_e3 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr_e3
%c1_val_e3 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr_e3
%c2_val_e3 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr_e3

%avg_color_add_e3 = OpFAdd %v3float %c1_val_e3 %c2_val_e3
%avg_color_e3 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %avg_color_add_e3 %float_0_5

%edge_vec_clip_e3 = OpFSub %v4float %p2_clip_e3 %p1_clip_e3
%edge_vec_norm_e3 = OpNormalize %v4float %edge_vec_clip_e3

%edge_vec_norm_x_e3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %edge_vec_norm_e3 %int_0
%edge_vec_norm_y_e3 = OpCompositeExtract %float %edge_vec_norm_e3 %int_1

%perp_x_e3 = OpFNegate %float %edge_vec_norm_y_e3
%perp_y_e3 = %edge_vec_norm_x_e3

%scaled_perp_x_e3 = OpFMul %float %perp_x_e3 %float_0_008
%scaled_perp_y_e3 = OpFMul %float %perp_y_e3 %float_0_008

%scaled_perp_clip_e3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %scaled_perp_x_e3 %scaled_perp_y_e3 %float_0_0 %float_0_0

%v_quad1_e3 = OpFAdd %v4float %p1_clip_e3 %scaled_perp_clip_e3
%v_quad2_e3 = OpFSub %v4float %p1_clip_e3 %scaled_perp_clip_e3
%v_quad3_e3 = OpFAdd %v4float %p2_clip_e3 %scaled_perp_clip_e3
%v_quad4_e3 = OpFSub %v4float %p2_clip_e3 %scaled_perp_clip_e3

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad1_e3
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e3
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad2_e3
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e3
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad3_e3
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e3
OpEmitVertex

OpStore %gl_out_pos_ptr %v_quad4_e3
OpStore %outColor %avg_color_e3
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

[Flat-Shaded Triangles] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 34: 14: Invalid capability 'SampledImage'.

Geometry Shader - Flat-Shaded Triangles (triangle_adjacency)

View SPIR-V (8602 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Google Shaderc over Glslang; 1
; Capabilities:
;   Geometry
;   Shader
;   Linkage
;   InputAttachment
;   SampledImage
;   ImageGatherExtended
;   StorageImageExtendedFormats
;   GroupNonUniform
;   GroupNonUniformVote
;   GroupNonUniformArithmetic
;   GroupNonUniformBallot
;   GroupNonUniformClustered
;   GroupNonUniformPartitionedNV
; Memory Model: Logical; GLSL450
; EntryPoint: %main "main"
; Interfaces:
;   %gl_in
;   %worldPos
;   %normal
;   %color
;   %gl_out
;   %outColor
;
; All types, variables, and functions are defined below.

OpCapability Geometry
OpCapability Shader
OpCapability Linkage
OpCapability InputAttachment
OpCapability SampledImage
OpCapability ImageGatherExtended
OpCapability StorageImageExtendedFormats
OpCapability GroupNonUniform
OpCapability GroupNonUniformVote
OpCapability GroupNonUniformArithmetic
OpCapability GroupNonUniformBallot
OpCapability GroupNonUniformClustered
OpCapability GroupNonUniformPartitionedNV ; Need to make sure all capabilities are covered, though many might be default
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450

; --- GLSL.std.450 Extended Instruction Set ---
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; --- Type Definitions ---
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float = OpTypeFloat 32

%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%_ptr_Function_v3float = OpTypePointer Function %v3float
%_ptr_Function_v4float = OpTypePointer Function %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Input_v4float = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%_ptr_Output_v3float = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; gl_PerVertex_in
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
%uint_6 = OpConstant %uint 6 ; Array size for InputTrianglesAdjacency

%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_6
%_ptr_Input_arr_pv_in = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in

; gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out

; User-defined inputs (arrays of size 6)
%arr_v3float_6 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_6
%_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_6 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float_6

; Output color
; %_ptr_Output_v3float already defined above.

; --- Constants ---
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_one_third = OpConstant %float 0.33333334

%light_dir_v3 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1_0 %float_1_0 %float_1_0

; --- Global Variables ---
%gl_in = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_pv_in Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_6 Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_6 Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_6 Input

%gl_out = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out Output
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v3float Output

; --- Entry Point and Execution Modes ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%void_func = OpTypeFunction %void

OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputTrianglesAdjacency
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; --- Debug Names ---
OpName %main "main"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex_in"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_in 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %gl_PerVertex_out "gl_PerVertex_out"
OpMemberName %gl_PerVertex_out 0 "gl_Position"
OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %1 "GLSL.std.450"
OpName %void "void"
OpName %bool "bool"
OpName %int "int"
OpName %uint "uint"
OpName %float "float"
OpName %v3float "v3float"
OpName %v4float "v4float"
OpName %_ptr_Function_v3float "_ptr_Function_v3float"
OpName %_ptr_Function_v4float "_ptr_Function_v4float"
OpName %_ptr_Input_v3float "_ptr_Input_v3float"
OpName %_ptr_Input_v4float "_ptr_Input_v4float"
OpName %_ptr_Output_v3float "_ptr_Output_v3float"
OpName %_ptr_Output_v4float "_ptr_Output_v4float"
OpName %uint_6 "uint_6"
OpName %arr_pv_in "arr_pv_in"
OpName %_ptr_Input_arr_pv_in "_ptr_Input_arr_pv_in"
OpName %_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out "_ptr_Output_gl_PerVertex_out"
OpName %arr_v3float_6 "arr_v3float_6"
OpName %_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_6 "_ptr_Input_arr_v3float_6"
OpName %int_0 "int_0"
OpName %int_1 "int_1"
OpName %int_2 "int_2"
OpName %int_4 "int_4"
OpName %float_0_0 "float_0_0"
OpName %float_1_0 "float_1_0"
OpName %float_0_2 "float_0_2"
OpName %float_0_8 "float_0_8"
OpName %light_dir_v3 "light_dir_v3"
OpName %void_func "void_func"

; --- Main Function ---
%main = OpFunction %void None %void_func
%entry = OpLabel
; ------------------- Load Input Data -------------------
%ptr_worldPos_0 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos %int_0
%p0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldPos_0

%ptr_worldPos_2 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos %int_2
%p2 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldPos_2

%ptr_worldPos_4 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %worldPos %int_4
%p4 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_worldPos_4

%ptr_color_0 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color %int_0
%c0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_0

%ptr_color_2 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color %int_2
%c2 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_2

%ptr_color_4 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v3float %color %int_4
%c4 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_color_4

; ------------------- Face Normal Calculation -------------------
%p2_minus_p0 = OpFSub %v3float %p2 %p0
%p4_minus_p0 = OpFSub %v3float %p4 %p0

; Extract components for cross product (a.y*b.z - a.z*b.y, a.z*b.x - a.x*b.z, a.x*b.y - a.y*b.x)
%ay = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2_minus_p0 1
%az = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2_minus_p0 2
%ax = OpCompositeExtract %float %p2_minus_p0 0

%by = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4_minus_p0 1
%bz = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4_minus_p0 2
%bx = OpCompositeExtract %float %p4_minus_p0 0

%tmp1_cross_x = OpFMul %float %ay %bz
%tmp2_cross_x = OpFMul %float %az %by
%cross_x = OpFSub %float %tmp1_cross_x %tmp2_cross_x

%tmp1_cross_y = OpFMul %float %az %bx
%tmp2_cross_y = OpFMul %float %ax %bz
%cross_y = OpFSub %float %tmp1_cross_y %tmp2_cross_y

%tmp1_cross_z = OpFMul %float %ax %by
%tmp2_cross_z = OpFMul %float %ay %bx
%cross_z = OpFSub %float %tmp1_cross_z %tmp2_cross_z

%cross_product_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %cross_x %cross_y %cross_z

%face_normal = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %cross_product_vec

; ------------------- Lighting Calculation -------------------
; Light direction is a constant %light_dir_v3 already defined
%dot_NL = OpDot %float %face_normal %light_dir_v3
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %dot_NL %float_0_0

; ------------------- Base Color Calculation -------------------
%sum_colors_0_2 = OpFAdd %v3float %c0 %c2
%sum_colors_0_2_4 = OpFAdd %v3float %sum_colors_0_2 %c4
%base_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %sum_colors_0_2_4 %float_one_third

; ------------------- Final Color Calculation -------------------
%term_0_8_diffuse = OpFMul %float %float_0_8 %diffuse
%factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_2 %term_0_8_diffuse
%final_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %base_color %factor

; ------------------- Emit Vertices -------------------
; Vertex 0
%ptr_gl_in_0_val = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in %gl_in %int_0
%ptr_gl_pos_in_0 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %ptr_gl_in_0_val %int_0
%gl_pos_0 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_gl_pos_in_0
%ptr_gl_pos_out = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Output_v4float %gl_out %int_0
OpStore %ptr_gl_pos_out %gl_pos_0
OpStore %outColor %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2
%ptr_gl_in_2_val = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in %gl_in %int_2
%ptr_gl_pos_in_2 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %ptr_gl_in_2_val %int_0
%gl_pos_2 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_gl_pos_in_2
OpStore %ptr_gl_pos_out %gl_pos_2 ; Reuse %ptr_gl_pos_out as it points to the single output gl_Position
OpStore %outColor %final_color
OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 4
%ptr_gl_in_4_val = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_gl_PerVertex_in %gl_in %int_4
%ptr_gl_pos_in_4 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Input_v4float %ptr_gl_in_4_val %int_0
%gl_pos_4 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_gl_pos_in_4
OpStore %ptr_gl_pos_out %gl_pos_4
OpStore %outColor %final_color
OpEmitVertex

OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Test 43: Fragment Shaders (HLSL) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing an HLSL pixel (fragment) shader for Vulkan. The shader will be
compiled with glslangValidator (-D flag for HLSL mode) targeting Vulkan 1.0,
then rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader, using Vulkan layout attributes):**
```hlsl
struct PSInput {
[[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0; // world-space position
[[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal : TEXCOORD1; // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
[[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv : TEXCOORD2; // texture coordinates in [0,1]
[[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent : TEXCOORD3; // tangent vector
[[vk::location(4)]] float3 color : TEXCOORD4; // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};
```

**Available constant buffer (set 0, binding 0):**
```hlsl
[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
float4x4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
float4x4 view; // offset 64
float4x4 projection; // offset 128
float4 lightPos; // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
float4 cameraPos; // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
float4 params; // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```hlsl
float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 // RGBA float, stored as rgba8unorm
```

**HLSL requirements:**
- Use Vulkan-specific attributes: `[[vk::location(N)]]` for inputs, `[[vk::binding(B, S)]]` for UBO
- Entry point must be named `main`
- Return type is `float4` with `SV_Target0` semantic
- Standard HLSL intrinsics are available: normalize, dot, reflect, pow, max, clamp, lerp, etc.
- Use `mul()` for matrix-vector operations if needed

**Write ONLY the complete HLSL source code.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the shader source.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0

Write GPU pixel shaders in HLSL (Microsoft’s high-level shading language) targeting Vulkan. The same 20 visual effects from the SPIR-V assembly test (lighting, patterns, fractals on a sphere) must be reproduced, but this time using HLSL’s C-like syntax with Vulkan-specific attributes.

The code is compiled to SPIR-V behind the scenes and rendered; the output is compared pixel-by-pixel against the reference images.

View HLSL (549 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;
    float4x4 view;
    float4x4 projection;
    float4 lightPos;
    float4 cameraPos;
    float4 params;
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    return float4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
}

HLSL Shader - Normal to RGB

View HLSL (1159 chars)
struct PSInput {
    [[vk::location(0)]] float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD0;   // world-space position
    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
    [[vk::location(2)]] float2 uv       : TEXCOORD2;   // texture coordinates in [0,1]
    [[vk::location(3)]] float3 tangent  : TEXCOORD3;   // tangent vector
    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

[[vk::binding(0, 0)]]
cbuffer UBO : register(b0) {
    float4x4 model;          // offset 0   (column-major)
    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
    float4x4 projection;     // offset 128
    float4 lightPos;         // value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
    float4 cameraPos;        // value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
    float4 params;           // value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};

float4 main(PSInput input) : SV_Target0 {
    // Normalize the interpolated normal
    float3 normalizedNormal = normalize(input.normal);

    // Map the normal from [-1, 1] to [0, 1]
    float3 color = (normalizedNormal + 1.0) / 2.0;

    // Output with alpha 1.0
    return float4(color, 1.0);
}

struct PSInput {

    [[vk::location(1)]] float3 normal   : TEXCOORD1;   // world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)

    [[vk::location(4)]] float3 color    : TEXCOORD4;   // per-vertex color (smoothly varies: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
};

    float4x4 view;           // offset 64
